En: As you talk it feels like chewing on gravel, granite, steel bars...
Zh: 当你说话的时候，感觉就像是在咀嚼砂砾、花岗岩和铁栏杆……

En: You told her you loved her. She has to feel *something*.
Zh: 你告诉她你爱她。她肯定会感觉到*什么*的。

En: More questions. Ask more.
Zh: 更多问题。再多一点。

En: You know what I meant. We're talking about it again. It came up again. This conversation is about *that* again.
Zh: “你知道我的意思。我们又说回这个了。它又出现了。这段对话又要扯到*那上面*去了。”

En: No, you don't. You're just being a martyr. And I'm really going now. The time is up. I must be on the 10:20 flight... She turns.
Zh: “不，你不明白。你只是个殉道者。我必须赶上10：20的飞机……”她转过身去。

En: Will we ever see each other again?
Zh: “我们还会再见面吗？”

En: I won't see you but you will see me.
Zh: “我不会再见你了，但是你会见到我。”

En: How can that be?
Zh: “那怎么可能？”

En: Oh, Harry, this is a dream, can't you see? I'm already in Mirova by now. Who knows how long ago this happened? She looks around. "A year, two, *five* years ago?"
Zh: “哦，哈里，这是个梦境，你没看见吗？现在我人已经在米诺瓦了。谁知道已经过去多久了？”她看看周围。“一年，两年，还是*五年*？”

En: How will I see you *again* then?
Zh: “那我怎样才能*再次*见到你呢？”

En: Right here. Tomorrow night. Once this dream starts happening it keeps happening -- three times a week. At least. And Harry, it really, really looks like it's started *happening* again. There's the video rental...
Zh: “就在这里。明天晚上。一旦你进入梦境，它就会一直发生——每周至少三次。还有，哈里，看起来那件事真的又要*发生*了。录像带租赁店出现了……”

En: I'm suffocatingly beautiful. And young. And I smell of tutti frutti chewing gum -- like I did that time when I asked you for forgiveness. After leaving you the first time, so long ago...
Zh: “我是那么的灿烂华丽，让人窒息。青春洋溢。而且我闻起来有一股水果口香糖的味道——就像我第一次离开你之后，回来祈求你原谅的时候一样。那是很久之前的事了……”

En: But this is intolerably bad.
Zh: “但是这真是糟糕的让人难以忍受。”

En: Oh, yes. This is real darkness. It's not death, or war, or child molestation. Real darkness has love for a face. The first death is in the heart, Harry.
Zh: “哦，是的。这是真正的黑暗。这不是死亡，或者战争，或者猥亵儿童。真正的黑暗长着一张爱情的脸庞。第一次死亡是在心里的，哈里。”

En: No...
Yes.
Zh: “要的。”

En: I like this.
Zh: “我喜欢这样。”

En: Silence. A distant wind blows. You can't think of anything pretty to say.
Zh: 沉默。远处的风在呼啸。你想不出任何好听的话。

En: Why? That's what *dolor* means.
Zh: 为什么？那就是*伤心*的含义。

En: You're a better man now. More level-headed. More *normal*.
Zh: 你现在变好了。更清醒。更*正常*。

En: The you she saw is gone, too. A small stack of sticks stands in its place. Begging.
Zh: 她看见的你也不见了。一小堆棍子立在原地。祈求着。

En: I've been reading books. I've got lots of new ideas about ideology and capital.
Zh: “我最近读了一些书，对意识形态和资本有了新的认识。”

En: That sounds nice, Harry, but I really don't want to argue about *ideology* with you right now...
Zh: “听起来不错，哈里。但我现在真的不想和你谈论*意识形态*的话题……”

En: By the way, I’m making *mad paper* now. My net worth is insane.
Zh: “对了，我现在可以做*疯纸*了，我的网络价值超级高。”

En: I know you still love me. (Kiss her.)
Zh: “我知道你还爱我。”（亲吻她。）

En: Not a war criminal.
Zh: 不是个战犯。

En: Not a mass murderer.
Zh: 不是杀人凶手。

En: Dresscode: Man of charms.
Zh: 着装要求：万人迷。

En: With your feet trembling from the steps you took -- tepid and fearful -- you stand against her; her body close to you, radiating warmth. With your eyes closed you move your lips on her mouth.
Zh: 你迈出蹒跚的步子——不瘟不火，又担惊受怕——站到她身旁；她的身体紧贴着你，散发着暖人的温度。你闭上双眼，嘴唇朝她的嘴唇贴了过去。

En: Your feet still tremble from the steps you took -- as if over an enormous distance -- standing against her; her body close to you, radiating warmth. With your eyes closed you move your lips on her mouth.
Zh: 你迈出蹒跚的步子——仿佛彼此之间隔着巨大的距离——站到她身旁；她的身体紧贴着你，散发着暖人的温度。你闭上双眼，嘴唇朝她的嘴唇贴了过去。

En: I have become an unbreakable kingsman.
Zh: “我已经成为了一个无坚不摧的王下骑士。”

En: I've taken responsibility for my actions now. I'm a new man. Weighty and normal.
Zh: “现在我能为自己的行为负责了。我是一个全新的人了，既重要又普通。”

En: Good. That’s... very nice. She doesn’t sound appropriately impressed.
Zh: “很好。这……非常好。”听起来她并没有被你打动。

En: You're not impressed?
Zh: “你觉得这没什么大不了的，是吗？”

En: You broke me. But I rebuilt myself. With fascism.
Zh: “你伤害了我，而我重塑了自我。靠法西斯主义。”

En: Look at my face. Can you not see how *hard* I am? (Point to your diamond hard fascist face.)
Zh: “看着我的脸。你看不出我有多*硬*吗？（指着自己如钻石般坚硬的法西斯的脸）

En: I don’t... I don’t know what to say. I’m tired.
Zh: ”我不……我不知道说什么。我试过了。”

En: But Harry, it doesn’t look like you rebuilt yourself, it looks like you fell apart without me. I can’t bare to look at it any more, okay? I feel *guilty*. That’s what I feel when I look at you. Please let me go...
Zh: “可是哈里，你看起来不像是重塑了自己，而像是在没有我的时候你崩溃了。我再也不想再看下去了，好吗？我感到*罪过*。我看到你的时候就是这个感觉。求你了，让我走吧……”

En: Harry, it doesn’t look like you’re *hard* at all, it looks like you fell apart without me. I can’t bare to look at it any more, okay? I feel *guilty*. That’s what I feel when I look at you. Please let me go...
Zh: “可是哈里，你看起来一点也不*硬*，而像是在没有我的时候你崩溃了。我再也不想再看下去了，好吗？我感到*罪过*。我看到你的时候就是这个感觉。求你了，让我走吧……”

En: It’s breaking. You feel fractures across you. Out the cracks comes nothing at all. No king, no man, and no king’s man. The cracks were all there ever was. We are a spiderweb of glass that’s painful to look at. And she’s turning her head.
Zh: 崩溃。你感到身体正在炸裂。而裂开之后，什么也没有蹦出来。没有国王，没有骑士，也没有王下骑士。裂痕一直都是存在的。我们是一张玻璃制成的蜘蛛网，看起来就让人痛苦。

En: There is a way back. To the kingdom of beauty. Of *us*. We need to go live in the pale, sweet love. Come, be trapped in amber with me! Forever!
Zh: “有一条路可以回去，回到*我们*美丽的国度。亲爱的，我们得投身到灰域之中。来吧，和我一起永遁于琥珀之中吧。”

En: I’m so tired, Harry. I’m so tired of all this... She sighs. "Can’t you see, I already *am* trapped in amber with you? We’re stuck here. I can’t do that any more. The aerodrome is the future. It is laughter and ease... I must go."
Zh: “我好累，哈里。这一切都让我觉得好累……”她叹了口气，“你看不出来吗？我*已经*和你困在琥珀中了？我们被困在这里了。我不能再这样下去了。飞机场才是未来。那里有欢乐和轻松……我必须走。”

En: You’re breaking. You feel fractures run across you. Out the cracks comes anger, and then nothing at all. No king, no man, and no king’s man. The cracks were all there ever was.
Zh: 你崩溃了。你感到身体正在炸裂。而裂开之后，什么也没有蹦出来。没有国王，没有骑士，也没有王下骑士。裂痕一直都是存在的。

En: This won’t be an argument. It will be emotional and true.
Zh: 这不是一场争论。这将是感性的、真实的。

En: You don't know what I found! There are these beautiful things that can happen. Mysterious -- below matter, even.
Zh: “你不知道我发现了什么！有许多美好的事情会发生。神秘的——甚至超越物质本身。”

En: Listen, please. It helped me realise I can’t let you go *because* loving you is impossible. You're like a star I should follow.
Zh: “听我说，求你了。这让我明白了一件事，我不能*因为*无法爱你让你走。你就像天上的星星，而我将追随你。”

En: There was a time I would have loved to hear about them. I would have hung on every word. I would have made you feel smart, just, hopeful. But now is not that time. Now we are in hell and in hell there is only the aerodrome. And boring disagreement.
Zh: “曾几何时，我会喜欢听到这番话。我会对你说的每个字深信不疑。我会让你觉得自己聪明、正直、有希望。但那都已经过去了。现在我们身处地狱，这里只有两样东西：飞机场，以及与你无聊的争执而已。”

En: A long sigh, one millennia in the making.
Zh: 一声长长的叹息，似乎酝酿了一个世纪。

En: Apricot scented chewing gum brushes your cheek.
Zh: 杏子味的芬芳冲刷着你的脸颊。

En: I'm not a star. I'm a confused young woman, eating your mind. There are no stars. There is no light. There will be no future. There is only this intersection. And the aerodrome. Where I must go, incessantly, brutally -- utterly without redemption or hope.
Zh: “我不是星星。我只是一个迷失了的年轻女性，吞噬着你的思维。没有星星，也没有光。更没有未来。只有这个十字路口，以及飞机场。我必须走了，残酷而果决地离开 —— 没有任何救赎或希望。”

En: The star has gone out. She can not rekindle it. You can not rekindle it. There is nothing within or below matter, just the dull *no* of a mind made up. Just like four billion others. I am so sorry.
Zh: 星光消逝殆尽。她没法令它再次亮起，你也一样。没有什么能够跻身于物质之中或超越物质本身，只有一个枯燥的*否定*的决心。就像其他40亿个决心一样。非常抱歉。

En: Now that I think of it, it's actually all just pointless shit and I should kill myself.
Zh: “现在想想，这一切都没有任何意义。我应该杀了我自己。”

En: She doesn't say anything. It’s excruciating.
Zh: 她什么也没说。这真是一种折磨。

En: Hear that? That's the sound of meaninglessness. Meaning, ideas, theory -- all that has evaporated. Now there is only dry silence -- the sound of a mind made up. Just like four billion others. I am so sorry.
Zh: 听见了吗？那听起来毫无意义。意义、想法、理论——所有这些都蒸发了。现在只有干瘪的沉默——下定决心的声音。就像其他40亿个决心一样。非常抱歉。

En: It’s not about *paper*, Harry, or anything like that... She sounds frustrated.
Zh: “重点不是*纸*，或者其他任何东西……”她听起来很沮丧。

En: It’s about taking care of yourself. Life is not a competition.
Zh: “重点是要照顾好你自己。人生并不是一场竞赛。”

En: Wrong. It *is* a competition. And I’m going to win.
Zh: “错。就*是*一场竞赛。而我要赢。”

En: Like she’s heard it before. A million times.
Zh: 好像她以前也听过，一百万次了。

En: I can’t do this talk again... She sounds like she’s going to cry -- but not in a good way.
Zh: “我不想再重复这样的对话了……”她听起来好像要哭了——但不是因为高兴。

En: You're yelling, Harry. She stops. "I can't do this. I can't be *afraid* of your emotions anymore. I can't talk about *mad paper* or any of it. Please just let me go."
Zh: “你在咆哮，哈里。”她停了下来。“我不能再继续了。不能再*害怕*你的情绪了。我不能和你讨论*疯纸*或任何相关的话题了。请你让我走吧。”

En: You have a new guy, right? He's fucking *poor* compared to me. I'm gonna INCINERATE him. I have more money than any human being should have. It's SCARY how rich I am. I’m richer than GOD!
Zh: “你找了个新对象，是吗？跟我比起来，他太*穷*了。我要*毁了*他。我比任何人都有钱。有钱得让人害怕。我比上帝还有钱！”

En: No, it’s not... I’m glad you’re finally taking care of yourself financially. I really am, but you need to do it for yourself. Not me. I don’t need it. I need to *run-run-run* to the aerodrome!
Zh: “不，不是这样的……我很高兴你终于能在经济上照顾好自己了，真的。但你得为了你自己，而不是我。我不需要钱。我需要的是*跑-跑-跑*到飞机场去！”

En: You're right. It's all fucking shit.
Zh: “你是对的。这一切都是狗屎。”

En: You failed. This failed. The hostile takeover. The dawn raid. Paper made out of broken, twisted trees... You're just insane, insane and gone. Even six billion won't fix you if she’s not there.
Zh: 你失败了。任务失败了。敌军占领了高地。黎明发动了突袭。纸张退变成了破碎、扭曲的树皮……你是个疯子，疯癫而迷茫。如果她不在了，即使60亿也拯救不了你。

En: She doesn't know what to say.
Zh: 她不知道说什么。

En: I'm so fucking normal right now.
Zh: “我现在再正常不过了。”

En: Yes. Okay. I'm glad.
Zh: “是的，很好。我为你高兴。”

En: I mean: I'm a moralist. The other moralists almost took me away on their airship! I'm not a broken, insane man who can't live without you. I know I made mistakes. And I've taken *full responsibility* for all of them. So you can live with me again if you want to. I'm better now.
Zh: “我是说，我是一名道德家。其他道德家几乎把我带上他们的飞船了！我不是一个没有你就会崩溃到生活不能自理的疯子。我知道我犯过错。为此我已经付出了*惨痛的代价*。所以如果叫你愿意，我们可以重新来过。我现在是个好人了。”

En: You're right. I'm not normal. I'm shit.
Zh: “你说的没错。我不是普通人，我是个垃圾。”

En: It doesn’t sound like you're better at all, Harry. It doesn’t even sound like you're a moralist, it just sounds like you want to... She spreads her arms. "*Win me back* or something. I don't want you to try that any more, okay? It's too sad, I need to *go*..."
Zh: “你听起来一点也不好，哈里。听起来你并不是一名道德家，你只是想成为道德家而已……”她张开双臂。“我不想你再尝试要*赢回我*了，好吗？那样太悲惨了，我得*走*了……”

En: Total annihilation. We got annihilated, Harry. It wasn’t about responsibility at all, it was always only about you having no power at all. Over her. Yourself. Anything. That's why they didn't take you on that airship: you're insane without her.
Zh: 全灭。我们被全灭了，哈里。这不是关于责任，或者其他任何东西。这永远就只是关于你对任何事情都没有权威。对她，对你自己，或其他任何东西。所以他们才没把你带上那艘飞船：没有她，你只是个疯子而已。

En: Do you know how much it hurts me to hear you say that? She sounds downright angry. "I'm shit, you made me shit... I can't do this any more. I can't make you *insane* and *shit* any more, I can't let you turn me into a bad person. I have to go..."
Zh: “你知道你这么说对我的伤害有多大吗？”她的声音带着显而易见的怒意。“我是垃圾，是你把我变成垃圾的……我不能再继续下去了。我不能再让你变成*疯子*和*垃圾*了，我不能让你把我变成一个坏人。我得走了……”

En: Total annihilation. We got annihilated, Harry. You never had any power, you never were a moralist -- or anything. You can't even be insane or shit any more. You have to be *nothing*. Nothing without the light and grace of love.
Zh: 全灭。我们被全灭了，哈里。你从来就没有任何权威，你也从来不是一名道德家。你甚至不再是*疯子*或者*垃圾*了。你只能*什么都不是*。没有光，也没有爱。

En: You're right, it isn't nice. It's shit and I should kill myself.
Zh: “你是对的。这不好。这没有任何意义，我应该杀了我自己。”

En: She doesn’t say anything. It’s excruciating.
Zh: 她什么也没说。这真是一种折磨。

En: Dolores Dei -- the innocence of humanism, internationalism, and the welfare state -- turns around to face you. She has an airship bag in her hand. She seems to be in a hurry.
Zh: 德洛莉丝·黛——人道主义，国际主义和福利国家的无罪女王——转身面对你。她手上拖着一只旅行箱，似乎很着急。

En: Where are you going?
Zh: “你要去哪？”

En: Your skin is holy and soft.
Zh: “你的皮肤圣洁又柔软。”

En: What's in the bag?
Zh: “箱子里是什么？”

En: H-hey.
Can you stay for a moment? We need to talk. We need to have one more massive, epic showdown.
Zh: “你能不能稍微等一下？我们需要谈谈，再来一次更大规模的、更史诗的对决。”

En: Go. Good bye. [Leave.]
Zh: “去吧，再见。”[离开。]

En: Hey.
Just my scepter, my *globe crucigère*, a spare silk gown. A toothbrush. Travel documents. The Crown of Immortality.
Zh: “只有我的权杖，*十字圣球*,一套备用的丝绸法衣。一只牙刷。旅游证件。还有不朽王冠。”

En: How are you doing?
Zh: “你最近怎么样？”

En: I'm sorry. I shouldn't have bothered you.
Zh: “抱歉，我不应该打扰你的。”

En: Say nothing.
Zh: 什么也不说。

En: 'Hey'? That's all I get? (Smile.)
Zh: “‘嗨’？就只有这些吗？”（微笑。）

En: Crown of Immortality? Aren't you already wearing one?
Zh: “不朽王冠？你不是已经戴着一顶了吗？”

En: Cool.
Zh: “厉害。”

En: Oh, this? She corrects the wreath on her forehead.
Zh: “哦，这个吗？”她调整了一下前额上的花冠。

En: This is just a wreath. The Crown of Immortality is made of rarefied light, manna, and raw palladium. It was passed on to me by the rulers of late antiquity...
Zh: “这只是个花冠。不朽王冠是用纯净之光、吗哪还有生钯金制成的。它是古典时代晚期的统治者传承给我的……”

En: She looks at the suitcase, not knowing what more to say, then over her shoulder.
Zh: 她看了看旅行箱，不知道还能说些什么，然后回头看了看。

En: I'm doing really good, actually. Both professionally and romantically. I've come to a fulfilling and peaceful period in my life. She nods hastily. "How are you doing, Harry?"
Zh: “说实话，我挺好的。职业和恋爱关系方面都挺好的。我已经达到人生中一个圆满又平和的阶段。”她急匆匆地点点头。“你怎么样，哈里？”

En: I mean -- hey to you too? she says apprehensively.
Zh: “我的意思是——回应你的一声嗨？”她担忧地回答着。

En: I discovered a new species.
Zh: “我发现了一些新物种。”

En: I solved the entire case of the hanged man.
Zh: “我解决了吊人案。”

En: I'm not doing very well.
Zh: “我不太好。”

En: Wow -- see? A new species... She smiles. It's another sad smile, with knitted brows.
Zh: “哇哦——看见了吗？一些新物种……”她笑了。这是个悲伤的笑容，眉毛都拧在一起了。

En: I'm dying. In a ruined flak tower. Blood is dripping down my chest... I've had several heart attacks.
Zh: “我快死了。在一个废弃的高射炮塔里。鲜血从我的胸口滴落……我还犯了好几次心脏病。”

En: I'm dying. In a ruined flak tower. Blood is dripping down my chest... I've had a heart attack.
Zh: “我快死了。在一个废弃的高射炮塔里。鲜血从我的胸口滴落……还犯了一次心脏病。”

En: I'm dying. In a ruined flak tower. Blood is dripping down my chest...
Zh: “我快死了。在一个废弃的高射炮塔里。鲜血从我的胸口流淌下来……”

En: I'm in my head. I miss you.
Zh: “我在我的脑海里。我想你。”

En: Yes. She looks over her shoulder again. "I mean no. But I *am* in a hurry."
Zh: “是的。”她又回头看了看。“我是说没关系。但我*确实*在赶时间。”

En: She breathes out, impatiently.
Zh: 她不耐烦的呼了一口气。

En: Wow, see? The entire case... She smiles. It's another sad smile, with knitted brows.
Zh: “哇哦，看见了吗？整个案子……”她笑了。这是个悲伤的笑容，眉毛都拧在一起了。

En: I guess, yeah.
Zh: “我猜，是的。”

En: It changes nothing.
Zh: “什么也改变不了。”

En: Anyway.
Zh: “无所谓了。”

En: Okay, don't say you need to 'talk' right away. Melt the ice first -- this way you're *already* talking.
Zh: 好吧，不要马上说你需要*谈谈*！先破冰——这样你就*已经*在谈了！

En: But you don't even *want* to talk to her! She would only be cold and mean. Let her go.
Zh: 但是你根本就*不想*跟她说话啊！她只会冰冷又刻薄。让她走吧。

En: Let her *go?* This is the holy queen of the territories of Mundi and Insulinde! Think of the historic knowledge we could glean! This is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity -- to win her back!
Zh: 让她*走*？这可是蒙迪和伊苏林迪区域的圣后！想想我们能收集到的历史知识！这可是人生仅有一次的机会——为了把她赢回来！

En: Off to advise the queen of Shest, most likely. This is the holy suzerain of Mundi and Insulinde -- *definitely* not your wife -- you need to talk to her! Think of the historical knowledge you could glean!
Zh: 很可能是去给西斯特女王提建议。这可是蒙迪和伊苏林迪区域的圣后——*绝对*不是你的妻子——你需要跟她谈谈！想想我们能收集到的历史知识！

En: I don't know, man... what is the holy suzerain doing here? Something seems off...
Zh: 我不知道，兄弟……神圣的封建主在这里做什么？感觉好像有点不太对劲……

En: Silence, her nuptial gown flows in the wind, wraps around her holy body...
Zh: 沉默，她的结婚礼服在风中飞舞，将她的圣洁躯体包裹其中……

En: Win her *back*? How does that fit in here? And what is the holy suzerain doing here anyway?
Zh: 把她*赢回来*？在这里恐怕不合适吧？而且，圣主在这里做什么？

En: *Very* off. Just let her go. Listen to me for once...
Zh: *非常*不对劲。还是让她走吧。就听我这一次……

En: Something is off.
Zh: “感觉好像有点不太对劲。”

En: I'm sorry. I was heading to the aerodrome, I just don't have time to... She stops mid sentence, glances to her right. Then looks at her bag.
Zh: “抱歉，我要去飞机场，真的没有时间……”她话没说完，飞速地瞥了一眼右边，然后又看看自己的旅行箱。

En: You may not be able to take this. Not this time. Not anymore.
Zh: 你可能没办法承受。这次不行。再也不要了。

En: She means she doesn't have time to tend to your emotions.
Zh: 她的意思是她没时间照顾你的情绪。

En: I told you -- good things can still happen.
Zh: “我告诉过你——好事还是会发生的。”

En: She is trying to muster enthusiasm.
Zh: 她试着让自己热情一点。

En: Don't say that... I know this *positive* thing sounds stupid to you, Harry, but it works. We all have an obligation to be happy. You too. And you *will* be. Now... She looks over her shoulder...
Zh: “别这么说……我知道这种*积极*的事在你听来很傻，哈里，但是真的有用。我们都有开心起来的义务。而且你*会变得*开心起来的。现在……”她回头看了看……

En: Exactly, now... She glances over her shoulder. You hear distant traffic. An airship passes overhead, dogs bark somewhere.
Zh: “就是这样，现在……”她回头看了一眼。你听见远处传来交通工具的声音。一架飞艇在头上飞过，某处传来了狗的吠叫。

En: I'm going to Mirova. To live there -- in Graad. It's one million kilometres away, Harry. Might as well be another lifetime.
Zh: “我要去米诺瓦。在那里住下——在格拉德。那里有100多万公里远，哈里。我们可能要来世再见了。”

En: You don't have time to tend to my emotions?
Zh: “你没时间照顾我的情绪吗？”

En: She sighs and looks over her shoulder.
Zh: 她叹了口气，回头望了望。

En: What are you *doing?* Stop saying things like that.
Zh: 你在*做什么*？别再说那种话了。

En: Yes, if you scare her off you will never *glean* all the historic knowledge...
Zh: 是的，如果你把她吓跑，就永远无法*收集*到那些历史知识了……

En: No, Harry. She shakes her head. "It's just regular skin. I'm not as beautiful as you always thought I was. Let's not get into..."
Zh: “不，哈里。”她摇摇头。“我的皮肤很普通。我不像你想象中那么漂亮。我们还是不要……”

En: God, Harry... She shakes her head, her eyebrows knitting together with worry.
Zh: “天啦，哈里……”她摇摇头，眉毛因为担心都拧在了一起。

En: You have to take care of yourself. You're not a young man anymore. If you keep going like this you'll... She falls silent.
Zh: “你必须照顾好自己。你已经不是个年轻人了。如果继续这么做，你就会……”她陷入了沉默。

En: Well, I'm in my head too. We're all in our heads.
Zh: “呃，我也在自己的脑海中。我们全都是。”

En: Do you miss me there?
Zh: “你会想念这里吗？”

En: Okay. I'll go back into mine then.
Zh: “好吧。那我还是回到自己这里来吧。”

En: Sometimes... Not as often as I used to. So much time has passed. More than it seems here... She stares at her feet -- the zebra stripes on the intersection. The lights of the video rental glow in her hair.
Zh: “有时候会……跟之前比没那么频繁了。已经过去这么久了。比看起来的要多……”她盯着自己的脚下——十字路口的斑马线。录像带租赁店的灯光在她的头发上闪闪发光。

En: She doesn't reply. You're back in your head. There's silence.
Zh: 她没有回复。你又回到了自己的脑海里。那里一片安静。

En: Desperation is gearing up.
Zh: 绝望正在增加。

En: This is everything I always warned you about.
Zh: 我一直都想警告你这一点。

En: You are. None of the others are as beautiful as you.
Zh: “你就是。没人像你一样漂亮。”

En: Yes. Let's not. I'm sorry I said that.
Zh: “是的。还是不要了。很抱歉，我不该说这些话。”

En: She does not answer. There's that expression again.
Zh: 她没有回答，又露出了那个表情。

En: You have to say *something*.
Zh: 你必须得说点*什么*。

En: All the stars burn in absolute silence. Have you ever realized?
Zh: “所有星星都在绝对的寂静中燃烧。你有没有注意到这一点？”

En: No. It's stupid. No, no, no. No, I don't want to say those STUPID THINGS!
Zh: 不，这样太傻了。不行，不行，不行。我才不想再说那种蠢话了！

En: The poetry thing is not going to help. It's only going to make things worse. I *really* have to go... I don't even know how you got here.
Zh: “作诗之类的没帮助的。只会让情况变得更糟。我*真的*要走了……我甚至都不知道你是怎么过来的。”

En: I'm sorry. I'm foam. All I can do is foam, it's meaningless.
Zh: 我很抱歉。我吹牛了。我唯一会做的就是吹牛，这毫无意义。

En: It's okay. She puts no effort into making it sound as if it's actually okay.
Zh: “没事的。”她没有努力让它听起来像没事一样。

En: No, Harry. She shakes her head sadly. "No. I don't want a *massive, epic showdown*. I want to go to the aerodrome. I have tickets for the 10:20 flight to Mirova..." She looks at you plaintively. "Really..."
Zh: “不，哈里。”她悲伤地摇摇头。“不，我不想来一场什么*规模更大的史诗对决*。我想去机场。我要搭10:20的航班去米诺瓦……”她哀怨地看着你。“真的……”

En: We don't have anything to talk about anymore. Every combination of words has been played out. The atoms don't form us anymore: us, our love, our unborn daughters...
Zh: “我们已经没什么好说的了。所有词语的组合都已经用尽。原子不再把我们组合在一起：我们的爱，我们未出世的女儿……”

En: It's all gone. I have to go to the aerodrome. I have to leave Revachol and you. And you have to be alone -- in hell, forever. That's just the way it is.
Zh: “全都不在了。我必须去机场。我要离开瑞瓦肖，离开你。而且，你必须孤身一人——永远困在地狱里。事情就是这么回事。”

En: ...is what you want to say. But you don't. Hammers clang in the distance. Children laugh...
Zh: ……这就是你想说的。但是你没有说出口。锤子在远处叮当作响。孩子们在欢笑……

En: God damn it, everything was fine already...
Zh: 真该死，一切已经很好了……

En: I want to go!
Zh: 我想走！

En: The light from the video rental casts shadows on the ground. She turns her face and it's illuminated by it. Red and cyan...
Zh: 录像带租赁店的灯光在地面上投下阴影。她转过头，脸庞在被灯光照的透亮。红色，蓝绿色……

En: Where? There's water all around. She turns her face and it's illuminated by the sign of the video rental... Red and cyan...
Zh: 哪里？地上全是水。她转过脸，录像带租赁店的标志照亮了她……红色，蓝绿色……

En: I can't help you. I am totally useless. Everything I've said is lies. I want the exact same bad things you want. To stand here, like a pillar of salt, saying...
Zh: 我没办法帮你。我完全派不上用场。我所说的一切都是谎言。我想要的那些坏东西跟你一样。站在这里，像一根盐柱，诉说着……

En: But... that's not a very good way for things to be.
Zh: “但是……事情这样是不对的。”

En: I get the feeling you're not really Dolores Dei.
Zh: “我有种感觉，你不是真正的德洛莉丝·黛。”

En: I bought you this figurine of a Headless FALN Rider! (Give it to her.)
Zh: “我给你带了个无头FALN骑士的雕像！”（交给她。）

En: I've heard you before. You're the voice on the phone.
Zh: “我以前听过你的声音。电话里那个声音就是你。”

En: But you said I have a vast soul and you will always come back to it.
Zh: “但是你说我拥有广阔的灵魂，你永远都会回到我这里。”

En: You're not even human.
Zh: “你甚至都不是人类。”

En: Don't go...
Zh: “不要走……”

En: Oh god, whatever you do, don't try to kiss her yet -- not after that, you're still reeling... you'll fall over if you try it now...
Zh: 天啦，不管你做什么，先别去尝试亲吻她——在那一切发生之后不行，你还有些眩晕……如果你现在尝试的话，你会绊倒的……

En: It's not, but... She looks at her feet. Little golden sandals cover her toes.
Zh: “是不对，但是……”她看着脚下。一双秀气的金色凉鞋盖住了她的脚趾。

En: I have some other questions for you.
Zh: “我还有其他问题要问你。”

En: I can't answer your *other questions*, Harry. Not anymore... I have to go.
Zh: “我不能回答你的*其他问题*，哈里。再也不行了……我得走了。”

En: But what? Tell me there's *something* good...
Zh: “但是什么？告诉我，还会有*好事*发生……”

En: I don't know why I said *but*. There is no but.
Zh: “我不知道为什么自己会说*但是*。根本没有但是。”

En: I don't know what you mean, Dolores Dei? She looks at you quizzically. It does not seem like a mystery she wants to get into.
Zh: “我不明白你的意思，德洛莉丝·黛？”她疑惑地看着你。这似乎是她不想深入的一个谜题。

En: You're... the *ex-something*.
Zh: “你是……*旧日之物*。”

En: You're my wife.
Zh: “你是我的妻子。”

En: You're... (Point to your head.) "The mourning."
Zh: “你是……”（指着自己的脑袋。）“哀伤。”

En: On second thought -- you're Dolores Dei, queen regnant of the territories of Mundi and Insulinde -- and nothing else. (Conclude.)
Zh: “我又仔细想了想——你是德洛莉丝·黛，统治蒙迪和伊苏林迪区域的女王——没别的了。”（总结。）

En: Move your mouth.
Zh: 移动你的嘴。

En: That's it, yes, she looks up from her toes. "We've talked about it a million times. You will get over it, just like I did. People do. Things will get good for you again..."
Zh: “就这样，是的。”她抬起头。“我们已经说过一百万次了。你会挺过去的，就像我一样。人们都会这样。一切都会变好的……”

En: That's it?
Zh: “就这样？”

En: I'm not getting over it *at all*!
Zh: “我*根本*没有挺过来！”

En: Good for me where? In FUCKING HELL?!
Zh: “哪里对我好了？在该死的地狱里吗？！”

En: You're right. I don't even remember who you are anymore! Ha-ha!
Zh: “你说得对。我甚至都想不起来你是谁了！哈哈！”

En: Maybe. I think I've reached the end of the investigation.
Zh: “也许吧。我想调查已经抵达了终点。”

En: Where? In *HELL*?
Zh: 哪里？在*地狱*里吗？

En: Stop, you're only making it worse for him -- you never help with *anything*.
Zh: 停下来，你只会让事情变得更糟糕——你从来都*帮不上忙*。

En: Oh yes! She'll come around now. I made her love you again, Harry.
Zh: 哦，是啊！现在她清醒过来了。我会让她再次爱上你的，哈里。

En: Are you *stupid*?
Zh: 你*傻了*吗？

En: She's about to say something. Here it comes. She's starting to *love* him again.
Zh: 她要开口了。来了，她又要再次*爱上*他了。

En: Her innocence Dolores Dei fiddles with the handle of her airport bag. She has a *pained* expression on her face. It's agonizing.
Zh: 无罪女王德洛莉丝·黛摆弄着旅行箱的把手，脸上露出*痛苦*的表情。实在是让人痛苦难耐。

En: See?! She isn't saying anything!
Zh: 看见了吗？！她什么也没说！

En: I don't understand. It was... she herself said...
Zh: 我不明白。这是……她自己说……

En: We were bad for each other, okay? I was bad for you. Can you not see, I'm *bad*? I had to stop, I couldn't just turn into a bad person... You *will* get better.
Zh: “我们一直在互相伤害，好吗？我对你不好。你没看见吗，我那么*坏*？我必须停下来，我不能变成一个坏人……你*会*变好的。”

En: It doesn't have to be like this. Maybe we could try again? (Proceed.)
Zh: “其实不应该这样的。也许我们再试一次？”（继续。）

En: Okay then. Super okay. I still have other things I need to know. (Withdraw.)
Zh: “那好吧。特别好。还有一件事我必须知道。”（收回。）

En: It just takes some time. For you, I think it will take something like... twenty years maybe? It was hard for me too, you know -- I used to think I couldn't live without you... She looks you straight in the eye -- her irises are light blue, flecked with green.
Zh: “只是需要一点时间。对于你来说，我觉得大概也就是……可能20年吧？对我来说也很艰难，你知道的——我曾经以为自己离开你就不能活……”她直直地盯着你的双眼——她的虹膜是淡蓝色的，还夹杂着一点绿色。

En: But -- I can.
Zh: “但是——我可以。”

En: She keeps her shoulders squared and her back straight but it's clear you're still making her sad.
Zh: 她挺直了肩膀和后背，显然你还是让她伤感。

En: Your Innocence Dolores Dei, I'm sorry I made you sad.
Zh: “无罪女王德洛莉丝·黛，让你伤心了，我很抱歉。”

En: It's okay.
Zh: “没事的。”

En: No, Harry, we can't.
Zh: “不，哈里，我们不行的。”

En: Why?
Zh: “为什么？”

En: We already tried again and it didn't work.
Zh: “我们已经尝试过了，但是没有成功。”

En: What went wrong when we tried again? I can do it better. (Proceed.)
Zh: “我们重新开始的时候，到底是哪里出问题了？我可以做的更好的。”（继续。）

En: I don't know. Please... She shuffles from one golden-sandaled foot to the other. In the distance a street car screeches.
Zh: “我不知道。拜托……”她的重心从一只穿着金色凉鞋的脚转移到另一只。远方的街道传来汽車尖锐的呼啸声。

En: See? Her eyes widen. "It just takes some time. For you, I think it will take something like... twenty years maybe? It was hard for me too. I used to think I couldn't *live* without you..." She looks you straight in the eye -- her irises are light blue, flecked with green.
Zh: “看见了吗？”她睁大双眼。“只是需要一点时间。对于你来说，我觉得大概也就是……差不多20年吧？对我来说也很艰难。我曾经以为自己离开你就不能*生活*下去……”她直直地盯着你的双眼——她的虹膜是淡蓝色的，还夹杂着一点绿色。

En: See? Her eyes widen. "It just takes some time. For you, it will take something like... twenty years maybe? It was hard for me too. I used to think I couldn't *live* without you..." She looks you straight in the eye -- her irises are light blue, flecked with green.
Zh: “看见了吗？”她睁大双眼。“只是需要一点时间。对于你来说，我觉得大概也就是……差不多20年吧？对我来说也很艰难。我曾经以为自己离开你就不能*生活*下去……”她直直地盯着你的双眼——她的虹膜是淡蓝色的，还夹杂着一点绿色。

En: It's not. It's just not possible. It's like *eating rocks*. You just can't *do* it.
Zh: 不行的。根本不可能。这种感觉像是在*啃石头*。你就是*做不到*。

En: With all my strength, I can't. It's like eating rocks.
Zh: “就算用尽我所有的力量，我也做不到。感觉像是在啃石头。”

En: There is a silence. She looks at you, then over her shoulder. Then corrects the wreath on the dome of her forehead.
Zh: 沉默。她看着你，回头望了望，然后摆弄了一下前额的花冠。

En: Why? Why can't we be together?
Zh: “为什么？我们为什么不能在一起？”

En: Harry, we can't be together because you're insane. Her eyes turn to sorrowful ovals.
Zh: “哈里，我们不能在一起，因为你疯了。”她的眼睛里流露出悲哀。

En: Okay. I have *other questions* for you now.
Zh: “好吧。我还有*其他问题*要问你。”

En: Okay, I won't ask any more.
Zh: “好吧，我再也不会问了。”

En: She does not seem relieved at all. Glances over her shoulder, then at you... the neon sign of the video rental glows behind her...
Zh: 她好像一点也没有放松。她回头望了望，然后转向了你……录像带租赁店的霓虹标志在她身后闪闪发光……

En: What *other things*? She shakes her head. "We've been through *all* the things, Harry..."
Zh: “什么*其他事情*？”她摇摇头。“我们经历过*所有*事情了，哈里……”

En: Insane... how?
Zh: “疯了……怎么疯了？”

En:
Insane -- like what? Like *cool* insane?	“疯了——比如说什么样？那种很*酷*的疯吗？”
0x01000072000038C8	Dialogue Text	DREAM SEAFORT / DOLORES DEI	You	Like: 'Wow, that cop's crazy'?"
Zh: “就像是：哇哦，那个警察是疯了吧？”

En: I'm not insane. Don't say that.
Zh: “我没疯。别这么说。”

En: So you felt that way once? That you cannot live without me?
Zh: “这么说你曾经有过那种感觉？离开我不能活？”

En: Yes. But that time is gone now. So *very* gone.
Zh: “是的，但是那个时候已经过去了。*完全*过去了。”

En: Is that how it is now? We should just try all good things *twice* and then give up? By that logic...
Zh: 现在就这样了吗？我们应该把所有好事都尝试*两遍*，然后放弃？按照那个逻辑……

En: Not you too...
Zh: 你也不行……

En: Let's be the last sane people in the world -- but only twice. If it doesn't work, let's lose our minds and let it all sink into the pale!
Zh: “让我们变成这个世界上最后的正常人吧——但是只有两次。如果那样不行，我们就发疯，让一切都陷入灰域！”

En: Let's try to return Revachol to the likeness of the holy sun in the sky -- but only *twice*. The third time, let's abandon it to debauched homo-sexuals!
Zh: “我们试着回到瑞瓦肖，回到那宛如太阳一般圣洁的地方——不过只用*两次*。如果有第三次，我们就堕落下去吧！”

En: Let's try inventing the future *twice* and if it doesn't work -- abandon it and live on welfare? Is that how we should do *everything*?
Zh: “让我们试着创造*两次*未来，如果那样不行——就抛弃它，然后依靠福利生活？难道*所有事*不应该都是这样的吗？”

En: Let's try building Communism *twice*. If it doesn't work, let's abandon it and be slaves forever instead?
Zh: “让我们试着建设*两次*康米主义。如果那样不行，我们就抛弃它，然后永远做奴隶？”

En: Yes. Of course. You've got everything under control and I'm hysterical because I don't want to keep hurting you... She looks away from you.
Zh: “是的，当然。一切都在你的掌控之中，歇斯底里的是我，因为我不想继续伤害你……”她把目光从你身上移开。

En: Yes. Of course. You're a kingsman and I'm a socialist traitor, because I don't want to keep hurting you... She looks away from you.
Zh: “是的，当然。你是个骑士，而我是工人主义的叛徒，因为我不想继续伤害你……”她把目光从你身上移开。

En: Of course, you're a visionary entrepreneur, and I'm a *social democrat* -- because I don't want to keep hurting you... She looks away from you.
Zh: “是的，当然。你是个有远见的企业家，而我只是个*社会民主主义者*——因为我不想继续伤害你……”她把目光从你身上移开。

En: Yes. Of course. I'm *bourgeois* -- because I don't want to keep hurting you... She looks away from you.
Zh: “是的，当然。我是个*资产阶级分子*——因为我不想继续伤害你……”她把目光从你身上移开。

En: She avoids turning them to you...
Zh: 她在避免这一段……

En: I'm the sanest person I know.
Zh: “我是我认识的心智最健全的那个人。”

En: They're turning moist now, her eyes. She slowly shakes her head and tries to get a hold of herself, brushing her hands in her gown...
Zh: 现在它们开始变得潮湿了，她的眼睛。她慢慢摇摇头，努力想要控制住自己，不断用手磨蹭着自己的礼服……

En: Sometimes. You can be very safe, but... They're turning moist now. She slowly shakes her head and tries to get a hold of herself, brushing her hands in her gown...
Zh: “有时候。你可能很安全，但是……”现在她的眼睛变得潮湿了。她慢慢摇摇头，努力想要控制住自己，不断用手磨蹭着自己的礼服……

En: No, you *don't*. You've worked there for so long you can't even talk like a normal person anymore! It's always lists with you. *Questions*.
Zh: “不，你*没有*。你在那里工作了太久，甚至都没办法像正常人一样说话了！你总会列有一长串对话清单，问一大堆*问题*。”

En: Questions? Did someone say questions?
Zh: 问题？有人说问题了吗？

En: I don't have lists. (Lie.)
Zh: “我没有清单。”（撒谎。）

En: They're not lists. They're *trees*.
Zh: “那不是清单，那是*对话树*。”

En: Let's talk about something else.
Zh: “我们聊聊别的吧。”

En: What do you mean by insane?
Zh: “你说疯了是什么意思？”

En: This is another list, isn't it?
Zh: “你又在说你清单里的话了，不是吗？”

En: This is another one, isn't it? We're in a *tree* right now!
Zh: “你又说清单里的话了，不是吗？现在连*对话树*都冒出来了！”

En: See? *Let's talk about something else*... She sighs.
Zh: “看见了吗？*我们聊聊别的吧*……”她叹了口气。

En: No (Lie.)
Zh: “不是。”（撒谎）

En: Yes, but it's not possible to talk without trees.\n
Zh: “是的，但是对话不可能没有对话树的。”

En: Yes, but it's not possible to talk without lists.
Zh: “是的，但是对话不可能没有清单的。”

En: Lists are absolutely normal. Everyone has them. You just list everything you want to ask.
Zh: “有对话清单很正常啊。每个人都有的。你只需要把所有想问的问题都列出来就好。”

En: In descending order, usually... It's best to do them like that.
Zh: 一般来说是降序……这样做最好。

En: It's not just the lists... She corrects the wreath on her head, with her hands trembling now. "You get sad, Harry. *Too* sad. People can't get that sad. It's impossible to watch..."
Zh: “不仅仅是清单……”她调整了一下头上的花冠，手已经有些微微颤抖。“你很悲伤，哈里。*太*过悲伤。人们不会变得那么悲伤。根本没法看……”

En: It's not just the lists, or trees, or whatever... She corrects the wreath on her head, with her hands trembling now. "You get sad, Harry. *Too* sad. People can't get that sad. It's impossible to watch..."
Zh: “我说的不仅仅是清单，或者是对话树，或者随便你怎么叫吧……”她调整了一下头上的花冠，手已经有些微微颤抖。“你很悲伤，哈里。*太*过悲伤。正常人不会变得那么悲伤的，我根本没法看……”

En: But I like my lists.
Zh: “但是我喜欢我的清单。”

En: Other people get sad too, but not like you. You stay down for years, and then you start beating things... You get violent.
Zh: “其他人也会悲伤，但不像你一样。你消沉了好多年，然后开始砸东西……你变得暴力了。”

En: Other people get sad too, but not like you, you stay down for too long. Until you start giving your thoughts *names* and talking to things...
Zh: “其他人也会悲伤，但不像你一样。你消沉了太久。直到你开始给自己的想法*取名字*，然后开始自言自语……”

En: In conclusion -- you're ill. You're an old, insane man. And you have to be in hell until the end of your life. And I have to go to Mirova.
Zh: “总而言之——你病了。你变成了一个老疯子。而且，直到你生命的最后一刻，你都会永远待在地狱里。而我，必须去米诺瓦。”

En: Other people get sad too, but not like you, you stay down for too long. You only communicated with *encyclopaedic trivia*... I was so alone.
Zh: “其他人也会悲伤，但不像你一样。你消沉了太久。你只会跟*百科琐事*交流……我很孤独。”

En: Other people get sad too, but not like you, you stay down for too long -- and if you're not down, you're up, running around asking questions. Millions of questions...
Zh: “其他人也会悲伤，但不像你一样。你消沉了太久——如果你没有消沉，而是振奋的时候，就会到处跑去问问题。几百万个问题……”

En: Twenty years? That's so much time...
Zh: “20年？那也太久了吧……”

En: Yes. It only took me one year, maybe two. She smiles and wipes her brow in relief: "Whooh."
Zh: “是的。我只花了1年，也许是2年。”她笑了笑，放松地擦拭着额头。“呼。”

En: You know what I mean...
Zh: “你知道我是什么意思……”

En: Everyone gets a little down.
Zh: “每个人都会有一点消沉。”

En: In case you haven't noticed, I'm a cop. It's not easy work, like some kind of Academy or something.
Zh: “以免你还没有注意到，我是个警察。这可不是份容易的工作，就像是某种学院啊，或者其他之类的东西。”

En: In case you haven't noticed, I'm a cop. It's not easy work.
Zh: “以免你还没有注意到，我是个警察。这可不是份容易的工作。”

En: (Nod.) "Yes. I *may* know what you mean."
Zh: 点点头。“是的，我*也许*明白你什么意思。”

En: It was just a necktie. It's over anyway.
Zh: “它只是一条领带。再说这都已经过去了。”

En: Okay, I'll throw the necktie away! It's stopped saying things anyway.
Zh: “好吧，我会把领带丢掉！再说它已经不说话了。”

En: A little down? You've worked there for so long you can't even talk like a normal person anymore! It's always lists with you. *Questions*.
Zh: “一点消沉？你在那儿工作了太久，甚至都没办法像正常人一样说话了！你总会列有一长串对话清单，问一大堆*问题*。”

En: A cop... You've worked there for so long you can't even talk like a normal person anymore! It's always lists with you. *Questions*.
Zh: “一个警察……你在那儿工作了太久，甚至都没办法像正常人一样说话了！你总会列有一长串对话清单，问一大堆*问题*。”

En: It's not about some tie, Harry! You've worked there for so long you can't even talk like a normal person anymore! It's always lists with you. *Questions*.
Zh: “这跟领带没关系，哈里！你在那儿工作了太久，甚至都没办法像正常人一样说话了！对你来说一直都是清单。*问题*。”

En: The morning? I don't understand.
Zh: “哀伤？我不明白。”

En: No. I meant *mourning*. I'm grieving -- but you're not even dead.
Zh: “不。我的意思是*哀悼*。我在为你哀悼——但你根本都没死。”

En: It's probably better that you don't.
Zh: “你不明白更好。”

En: Oh my god, Harry! Stop. I don't want to hear anything about *the mourning*, mourning someone who's still alive -- *any of that*!
Zh: “我的天啦，哈里！停下来吧。我不想再听到任何跟*哀悼*有关的*事情*，为还活着的人哀悼——*什么都不想听*！”

En: I can't do that anymore. I'm not eighty years old, I'm thirty two. People my age are not supposed to mourn... She breathes out, it sounds more angry than a sigh.
Zh: “我不会再这么做了。我不是8岁小孩，我已经32了。我这个年纪的人不应该哀悼……”她呼出一口气，比起叹息更像是生气。

En: This... is a bit *much* for me. It feels like your ribs are cracking around your heart.
Zh: 这个……对我来说有点*太过*了。感觉你心脏周围的肋骨都裂开了。

En: Yes. It really, *really* is better that I don't.
Zh: “是的。我不明白*真的*更好。”

En: That's so hurtful.
Zh: “真是太伤感情了。”

En: Good. I think I feel another heart attack coming.
Zh: “很好。我感觉好像又要犯心脏病了。”

En: Good. I think I feel a heart attack coming.
Zh: “很好。我感觉要犯心脏病了。”

En: Just rub your chest and moan.
Zh: 摩擦自己的胸口，呻吟着。

En: The advisor to the queen of Suresne sighs and looks down -- at the crumbling asphalt. There is nothing she can do about your chest pain.
Zh: 苏雷恩女皇的导师叹了口气，随后低下头——看着剥落的沥青。关于你的胸痛，她什么也做不了。

En: Then why are we doing it? The advisor to the queen of Suresne sighs and looks down -- at the crumbling asphalt.
Zh: “我们为什么要这么做？”苏雷恩女皇的导师叹了口气，随后低下头——看着剥落的沥青。

En: Then why are we doing this? The advisor to the queen of Suresne sighs and looks down -- at the crumbling asphalt.
Zh: “那我们为什么要这么做？”苏雷恩女皇的导师叹了口气，低下头——看着剥落的沥青。

En: Wasn't I Dolores Dei just a second ago? Now I'm the *ex-thing*... You're confusing me. Look, I have to be at the Lausanne Aerodrome at 10:20 PM. I still have a light rail to catch...
Zh: “一秒前我不还是德洛莉丝·黛吗？现在我又变成*前任之类的东西*了……你把我都搞混了。听着，我晚上10:20要到洛桑机场。而且我要赶一趟轻轨……”

En: There is nothing else.
Zh: “没有别的了。”

En: We all told you. *Everyone* warned you.
Zh: 我们都跟你说过。*所有人*都警告过你了。

En: I'm glad too, but I have to go. My friends are waiting for me on the platform. I can't let them wait -- it's impolite.
Zh: “我也很高兴，但是我得走了。我的朋友还在站台等我。我可不能让他们等着——实在是太不礼貌了。”

En: The Ancient Reptilian Brain was right. It was foolish of me to resurface to the loss.
Zh: “古老的爬虫大脑是对的。重新面对失去的是我蠢。”

En: I should have stayed down.
Zh: “我应该坚持下去。”

En: I'm glad we're having this conversation. I'm getting so much closure.
Zh: “很高兴我们能有这次谈话。我感觉豁然开朗了。”

En: I should have gone even deeper, to a place where I never met you. Because it's impossible to meet people in the ABYSS OF THE VOID!
Zh: “我应该再深入一点，去到一个从没遇见过你的地方。因为在虚无的深渊里，根本不可能见到任何人！”

En: She keeps glancing over her shoulder nervously. "I haven't even bought the tickets yet..."
Zh: 她紧张地不断回头张望。“我甚至都还没买票……”

En: Who, everyone?
Zh: 谁，所有人？

En: Everyone.
Zh: 所有人。

En: Literally all of you.
Zh: 字面意义上的，所有的你。

En: Great, she nods. "It's the abyss of the void. Soon it will be 'the gloaming'; then it will be the 'world-ending'... My friends are waiting for me on the platform, Harry. It's impolite to..."
Zh: “太棒了，”她点点头。“那里是空虚的深渊。很快就会是‘黄昏’；然后是‘世界末日’……我的朋友在站台等我，哈里。这样太不礼貌了……”

En: She sighs with frustration: "My friends are waiting for me on the platform. I can't let them wait -- it's impolite."
Zh: 她挫败地叹了一口气：“我的朋友还在站台等我。我不能让他们等着——这样太不礼貌了。”

En: I don't know what that *means*... She sighs with frustration. "My friends are waiting for me on the platform. I can't let them wait -- it's impolite."
Zh: “我不知道那是什么*意思*……”她挫败地叹了一口气：“我的朋友还在站台等我。我不能让他们等着——这样太不礼貌了。”

En: WHAT?!
Zh: 什么？！

En: You know what is *impolite?* Consigning a lieutenant detective of the Revachol Citizen's Militia to ETERNAL DAMNATION.
Zh: “你知道什么叫*不礼貌*吗？把一个瑞瓦肖公民武装的警督打入永恒的地狱。”

En: Cool. Your *friends*. Say hi to your friends for me then.
Zh: “很好。你的*朋友*。那就代我向你的朋友问好。”

En: Say nothing. Just look at her.
Zh: 什么也不说，只是看着她。

En: She does not look back, instead eyes her fingernails. They're bitten, frayed. The evening wind blows in, the gown wraps around her like a white flag.
Zh: 她没有回看你，而是低头看向自己的手指甲。它们被咬过，都磨损了。晚风吹来，她身上的礼服就像一面白色旗帜。

En: A thousand times, you beaten animal. A thousand times you've raised that fabric. What is underneath has always calmed you, centred you. Made you sane.
Zh: 千万次了，你这头精疲力尽的野兽。你撩起过那块布料千万次。下面的东西总是能让你平静，让你集中精神，让你发疯。

En: In your mind you could still climb inside her bed. Still the only man...
Zh: 在你的脑海里，你还能爬上她的床。还是她唯一的男人……

En: I will, she says. The evening wind blows in and the gown wraps around her like a white flag.
Zh: “我会的，”她说到。晚风吹来，她身上的礼服就像一面白色旗帜。

En: I am impolite with you, Harry, because you are the past. Me and those friends will have good times, together, in the future... The evening wind blows in, the gown wraps around her like a white flag. She says:
Zh: “我对你有些无礼，哈里，因为你已经是过去了。未来，我和那些朋友一起会过的很开心……”晚风吹来，她身上的礼服就像一面白色旗帜。她说到：

En: You're just an evil ape. We're all just evil apes.
Zh: “你只是一只邪恶的人猿。我们都只是邪恶的人猿。”

En: This is how human beings operate.
Zh: “这就是人类的运作方式。”

En: I was wrong. You don't have power over her anymore. You shouldn't have said that. I am wrong about everything. You should go on without me.
Zh: 我错了。你再也无法掌控她了。你不应该那么说的。我把一切都搞错了。从此之后你应该自己走下去。

En: You don't have to hate the world. She looks around her, at the evening light. "Can't you see how kind and beautiful everything is? I don't have time to deal with your pessimism -- there are so many people at the stop at this hour. They're all going to the aerodrome."
Zh: “你没必要痛恨这个世界。”她四下看了看，看着夜晚的灯光。“难道你看不见一切是多么的善良和美丽吗？我没时间处理你的悲观情绪了——这个点車站的人肯定很多。大家都要去机场。”

En: I don't want it... She doesn't take it. "It looks expensive. I don't want it."
Zh: “我不想要……”她没有收下。“它看起来很贵，我不想要。”

En: No, Harry. She shakes her head.
Zh: “不，哈里。”她摇摇头。

En: We were married. You wrote me the letter I threw away...
Zh: “我们结过婚。你给我写信，被我扔到了一边……”

En: I thought you liked figurines. I thought the figurines were for getting you back.
Zh: “我以为你喜欢雕像。我以为这个雕像能让你回到我身边。”

En: That's not what the figurines do, Harry.
Zh: “雕像可没这个作用，哈里。”

En: But then the figurines don't do anything...
Zh: “那雕像什么用也没有……”

En: She looks at the Headless FALN Rider between your fingers and doesn't know what to say.
Zh: 她看着你指尖的无头FALN骑士雕像，不知道说什么好。

En: The figurines... don't do *anything*? Anything at all? But I thought... the historic figure... she had...
Zh: 雕像……*什么*也做不了？一点都没用吗？但是我还以为……这个历史雕像……她……

En: She liked war games and figurines?
Zh: 她喜欢战争游戏和雕像？

En: Forget it.
Zh: 忘了吧。

En: Okay.
Zh: “好吧。”

En: Please don't give me any gifts... She looks at the airport bag, then at you.
Zh: “请不要给我任何礼物……”她看着自己的旅行箱，然后看着你。

En: Yes. I thought... it would be good.
Zh: 是的。我以为……这样挺好的。

En: A form of communication where words have failed?
Zh: 一种言语无法表达的交流形式？

En: Yes.
Zh: 是的。

En: It was a good idea. But she felt obliged by the Headless FALN Rider -- to give you things in return. Things she no longer wants to give you. So she refused. That's how it goes -- your figurine rider idea was *naive*.
Zh: 这是个好主意。不过这尊无头FALN骑士会让她感觉到一种义务——给你回礼。回给你她不想再给的东西。所以她拒绝了。就是这么回事——骑士雕像的主意实在是太*天真*了。

En: Okay. Sorry. I was naive. Stop listening to me. Forever.
Zh: 好吧，抱歉。我太天真了。别听我的，永远不要了。

En: Maybe this revolutionary figurine then? (Show it to her.) "Maybe you can take this revolutionary figurine? It's got a little musket."
Zh: “那这个大革命雕像呢？”（给她看看。）“也许你可以拿走这个大革命雕像？上面还有一把小步枪呢。”

En: What about dice? I had some custom dice made in this place...  a Doomed Commercial Area...
Zh: “那骰子呢？我有个定制骰子，就是在这里制作的……诅咒商业区……”

En: Okay, I won't give you things then.
Zh: “好吧，那我就什么都不给你了。”

En: No. Please. Please don't give me anything.
Zh: “不了，拜托。请不要给我任何东西。”

En: Harry, I don't want things. I want to go to the aerodrome.
Zh: “哈里，我不想要什么。我只想去机场。”

En: I didn't *ask* for things. It's too late to give me anything. I would have liked these things, a long time ago -- the Headless FALN Rider especially...
Zh: “我没有向你*要*什么东西。现在给我任何东西都太迟了。很久之前，我也许会喜欢这些东西——特别是无头FALN骑士……”

En: ... but now, only boring hell remains. Her crown-of-hair is aglow with the red of the neon on the corner. Like this, she tramples her feet for warmth. It's getting *really* cold outside.
Zh: “……但是现在，只剩下无聊的地狱。”她盘起的头发随着转角霓虹灯的红光一起闪烁。她跺着脚想要暖和身体。外面已经变得*很冷*了。

En: I didn't *ask* for things. It's too late to give me anything. I would have liked the Headless FALN Rider -- back then...
Zh: “我没有向你*要*什么东西。现在给我任何东西都太迟了。如果是之前——我会很喜欢那个无头FALN骑士……”

En: The air gets cold around you. She looks down on her stomach, then up at you. Her eyes are full of tremendous distance and mystery.
Zh: 你周围的空气变得冰冷。她低头看着自己的肚子，然后抬头望向你，眼睛里满是极大的距离感和神秘。

En: Shut up, I'm talking to her.
Zh: 闭嘴，我在跟她说话。

En: That's the problem. Look at what's pouring out of you...
Zh: 就是这个问题。看看你都说了些什么……

En: This is so grotesque.
Zh: “这真是太诡异了。”

En: It is. Useless... The evening wind blows in as she says the words, her gown wraps around her like a white flag.
Zh: “这样。没用的……”话音刚落，晚风拂起，她身上的礼服仿佛一面白色的旗帜。

En: Oh, Harry. You shouldn't have done that... She shakes her head very slowly, her white hair brushing her shoulders.
Zh: “哦，哈里。你不应该这么做的……”她慢慢摇摇头，银白色的头发扫过她的肩膀。

En: Not married. We were *engaged* then, living in a little house on the outskirts of Central Jamrock, past the lake that formed when a mainline pipe burst in the early Twenties. At the end of a street called...
Zh: “没有结婚。我们那会儿*订婚*了，住在加姆洛克城郊外的一栋小房子里，就在20年代早期主干管道破裂后形成的湖泊附近。在一个街尾，名叫……”

En: Voyager Road.
Zh: “远航路。”

En: What?
Zh: “什么？”

En: I don't wanna know! Stop.
Zh: “我不想知道！快住嘴。”

En: It opens up in front of you, with cracked asphalt, and maple leaves brushing your feet. Halos of street lights hang above you, hunched shadows carry grocery bags home. The lights are on -- in the little match box on the corner.
Zh: 它在你面前缓缓打开，还带着斑驳的沥青，还有枫叶从你脚下扫过。街灯的光晕悬挂在你头顶，蜷缩的阴影把杂货店的袋子带回了家。灯是亮的——就在转角的一个小火柴盒里。

En: Voyager Road 21A. She nods sadly. "It was so long ago. It was a million years ago, Harry. No -- a hundred million years ago. I loved you more than you will ever know. I loved you more than anyone has ever loved *anyone*."
Zh: “远航路21A号。”她悲伤地点点头。“那是很久以前的事了。是一百年前的事了，哈里。不——应该是一亿年前。你永远也不会知道我有多爱你。我对你的爱，超过了所有人曾经爱过的*任何人*。”

En: A street called Voyager Road. She smiles, sadly. "It was a million years ago, Harry. No -- it was a *hundred million* years ago. We were so, so young then. I loved you more than you will ever know. I loved you more than anyone has ever loved *anyone*."
Zh: “一条名叫远航路的街道。”她悲伤地笑了。“那是很久以前的事了。是一百年前的事了，哈里。不——应该是一亿年前。你永远也不会知道我有多爱你。我对你的爱，超过了所有人曾经爱过的*任何人*。”

En: But it is gone now. Nothing came of it. No children, nothing built. We live in the coldest of all possible worlds, Harry, orbiting the most distant star. It is agony, sheer agony... She shakes her head slowly: "How *bad* I have to go to the aerodrome."
Zh: “但是现在都没了。毫无结果。没有孩子，什么也没有。我们可能住在这个世界上最冰冷的地方，哈里，围绕着最遥远的星辰运行。太痛苦了，纯粹的痛彻心扉……”她慢慢摇摇头：“真是*糟糕*，我得去机场了。”

En: Would you fucking stop it with the aerodrome already!
Zh: “你能不能别再提那个该死的机场了。”

En: I get it. I get it, you have to go to the aerodrome!
Zh: “我明白。我知道的，你一定要去机场！”

En: I'll let you go there once you answer *all* my questions.
Zh: “一旦你回答完我的*所有*问题，我就会放你走。”

En: No, Harry. No human being in the history of the world has ever had to go to the *aerodrome* as much as I have to go there now. You see...
Zh: “不，哈里。在这个世界的历史上，从没有人像我一样需要现在就赶去机场。你看……”

En: I have to go there even more than I used to love you. And *that's* saying something. She looks at her travel bag.
Zh: 她看着自己的旅行箱。“我急着赶去那里的心情，甚至比之前爱你的还要多。*这*就说明了一些问题。”

En: I really, really, *really* have to go there. No human being in the history of the world has ever had to go to the *aerodrome* as much as I have to go there now. You see, Harry...
Zh: “我真的，真的，*真的*要过去。在这个世界的历史上，从没有人像我一样需要现在就赶去*机场*。你明白的，哈里……”

En: It was a hundred million years ago, Harry... No, make it a thousand million years ago. Practically on another planet. She looks at her travel bag, thoughtfully: "Have I told you how bad I need to go to the aerodrome?"
Zh: “那已经是一亿年前的事了，哈里……不，就当是十亿年前吧。几乎可以说是另一个星球的事了。”她若有所思地看着自己的旅行箱：“我有没有告诉过你，我真的要赶去机场了？”

En: The questions will not bring those times back, Harry. She shakes her head slowly.
Zh: “问题也不会把那些时光带回来的，哈里。”她慢慢摇摇头。

En: Beautiful world. Beautiful aerodrome.
Zh: “美丽的世界。美丽的机场。”

En: Evil aerodrome, taking everything away from me.
Zh: “邪恶的机场，把一切都从我身边带走了。”

En: See? She smiles -- as if a weight is lifted off her shoulders.
Zh: “明白了吗？”她笑了笑——就好像卸下了肩头沉重的负担。

En: The weight is you and your hate.
Zh: 这个负担是你，还有你的恨意。

En: Don't think like that, Harry... She smiles.
Zh: “别这么想，哈里……”她笑笑。

En: Forget about the aerodrome for one second... I lost. And it was *you* who I lost to.
Zh: “暂时忘了机场吧……我输了。我失去的是*你*。”

En: It wasn't a fight. I was never fighting you.
Zh: “不是打架。我永远不会跟你打架的。”

En: It's always a fight with these tiny apes. Someone always loses.
Zh: “总是跟这些小人猿打架。有人总是会输。”

En: I didn't want to fight you. You're the tiny ape I loved.
Zh: “我不想跟你打架。你是我爱的小人猿。”

En: She's really sorry she made you think like that about her beloved aerodrome.
Zh: 让你想到她亲爱的机场，她真的感觉很抱歉。

En: In the aerodrome there are silver-rotored ships, and beautiful flying trains I will go away on. It's a nice, peaceful place.
Zh: “机场有些银旋翼船，还有即将带着我离去的漂亮飞行火車。那里是个美好又和平的地方。”

En: You're right, yes. So *paranoid* of me. There is no antagonism between us.
Zh: “你是对的，没错。我太*偏执*了。我们之间没有对抗。”

En: She shakes her head. "Let's stop it with the apes, this isn't going anywhere."
Zh: 她摇摇头。“别再说人猿的事了，这样没用的。”

En: At first, yes. I *was* angry at you. But I truly am *not* anymore. My life is in a very good place... She glances over her shoulder.
Zh: “一开始是的。我*曾经*很生你的气。但是我真的已经*不再*生气了。我现在的生活状态很好……”她回头望了望。

En: You're right. I *was* angry at you. But I truly am *not* anymore. My life is in a very good place... She glances over her shoulder.
Zh: “你说得对。我*曾经*很生你的气。但是我真的已经*不再*生气了。我现在的生活状态很好……”她回头望了望。

En: Yes, Harry. I am. Things have gotten *much* better for me -- now that I am the ruler of the known world... She pulls up the silvery sleeve of her gown, to check the time. "Oh god, it's already so late, I have to *go*, Harry."
Zh: “是的，哈里，确实如此。对我来说，事情已经变得*好多了*——现在我是这个已知世界的统治者……”她拉起礼服的袖子，看看时间。“天啦，真的很晚了，我必须*走了*，哈里。”

En: A tiny golden watch with red straps... around her bony little wrist.
Zh: 一块嵌在红皮带上的小金表……环绕在她纤细的手腕上。

En: Do what?
Zh: “做什么？”

En: Call me like that...
Zh: “你那样称呼我……”

En: You ruined it. There was still a chance. You should have waited longer -- she would have called *you* instead!
Zh: 你毁掉了一切。本来还有机会的。你应该再等一会儿——她说不定反而会打给*你*！

En: I know. You would have called me yourself, if I just let you. I was too impatient.
Zh: “我知道。如果我让你这么做的话，你可能会亲自打给我。是我太急躁了。”

En: It wasn't me. It was my hand. (Raise your right hand.) "My fingers called you."
Zh: “那不是我。是我的手。”（举起你的右手。）“我的手指打给你的。”

En: Let's talk about SOMETHING ELSE.
Zh: “我们聊聊别的吧。”

En: Oh, Harry? Do you really think so? We haven't talked in *years*... I don't want to call you. I don't want to hear from you. I think of you less and less every year, weeks go by without me remembering you...
Zh: “哦，哈里？你真这么觉得吗？我们已经*好多年*没有说过话了……我不想打给你。我不想听到你的消息。一年年过去，我想你的次数越来越少。好几个星期过去了，我都不会记起你……”

En: Months already. Soon it will be years. Every season that passes the lights get less clear. I sit there, in Mirova -- in the holy gratitude of my bliss -- I put my hand on my belly and *smile...*
Zh: “已经几个月了。很快就会变成几年。每个季节过去，灯光都会变得越来越不清晰。我坐在那里，在米诺瓦——在欣喜若狂的感恩中——我会把手放在自己的肚子上，然后*微笑*……”

En: They shouldn't have. They really shouldn't. I was in Mirova already. Safe. In the warmth of the night. Wrapped in my future love. There, I think of you less and less, whole weeks go by without me remembering you...
Zh: “不会的，真的不会。那时我已经在米诺瓦了。很安全。在温暖的夜晚。被未来的爱人环抱。在那里，我会越来越不想你，甚至整个星期都不会记起你……”

En: Black-eyed dogs wander the alleys, apple trees hang their bony limbs low over the patchwork of roofs: red and black. Revachol West, the evening sun -- she's left and bloomed. Far away from us. Our vast soul.
Zh: 黑眼睛的野狗在小巷中游荡，苹果树那干枯的树枝低垂在层层叠叠的屋顶：红黑相间。瑞瓦肖西部，黄昏的太阳——她走了，精神焕发。离我们远远的。远离我们广阔的灵魂。

En: The DEATH BLOW is coming.
Zh: 致命一击就要来了。

En:
Months already. Soon it will be years without the hurt. I sit there in Mirova -- in the holy gratitude of my bliss -- I put my hand on my belly and *smile...*	“已经几个月了。很快就会变成几年。每个季节过去，灯光都会变得越来越不清晰。我会坐在米诺瓦——在欣喜若狂的感恩中——我会把手放在自己的肚子上，然后*微笑*……”
0x010000720000412F	Dialogue Text	DREAM SEAFORT / DOLORES DEI	You	Your name..."
Zh: “你的名字……”

En: Is Dora. That's what the voice said on the phone.
Zh: 是朵拉。就是你在电话里听到的声音。

En: Means pain.
Zh: 意味着痛苦。

En: Nothing, just pillows against you. Unresponsive... but for the taste of apricots.
Zh: 什么也没有，只有枕头靠着你。毫无反应……只有杏子的味道。

En: Dora is short for Dolores...
Zh: 朵拉是德洛莉丝的简称……

En: No. It can't be that. She's Dolores Dei, the innocence of humanism.
Zh: 不，不可能的。她是德洛莉丝·黛，人道主义的无罪女王。

En: You're right. I'm useless and boring. There is nothing I can add to you. You should get someone better to do this with...
Zh: 你是对的。我一无是处，又无聊透顶。我已经没什么可以补充的了。你应该找个更好的人做这个……

En: ...Du Bois, yes. Dora Du Bois.
Zh: ……杜博阿，是的。朵拉·杜博阿。

En: Are you Dora Du Bois?
Zh: “你是朵拉·杜博阿吗？”

En: Dora, is that you?
Zh: “朵拉，是你吗？”

En: Oh no, no-no-no-no. She shakes her head. "We're not doing that again."
Zh: “哦不，不不不不。”她摇摇头。“我们不会再来一遍了。”

En: Yes, Harry, it's me. She sighs.
Zh: “是的，哈里，是我。”她叹了口气。

En: That's why I think of Dolores Dei...
Zh: “难怪我一直想着德洛莉丝·黛……”

En: Why what?
Zh: “什么为什么？”

En: That was not the death blow yet. You saved yourself -- for now. Keep stumbling around and it *will* happen.
Zh: 这还不是致命一击。你救了自己——暂时而已。继续四处嗑嗑绊绊，它*就会*发生。

En: It's Dolores Dei. That's all.
Zh: 就是德洛莉丝·黛。就是这样。

En: The mysterious smile on her lips keeps stretching wider, as if she's forgotten you're there. In some great and calming thought. Then she notices you -- and it's immediately gone.
Zh: 她的嘴唇上挂着的神秘笑容咧得更宽了，就好像她已经忘记你还在那里。她陷入了某种浩瀚又平静的思绪中。然后她又注意到了你——它就立即不见了。

En: You're the symbol of pain.
Zh: “你是痛苦的象征。”

En: I don't want to say that.
Zh: 我不想这么说。

En: Great. Now I'm the *symbol of pain*. The smile immediately disappears from her face. The air remains just as cold.
Zh: “很好。现在我是*痛苦的象征*了。”笑容瞬间从她脸上消失。空气还是那么的冰冷。

En: But-- I thought if I threw the damned letter away it would help.
Zh: “但是——如果我把那封该死的信扔掉，我想会有所帮助的。”

En: It doesn't look like it did, Harry. I'm sorry. I shouldn't have wrote you any letters. I was too young then...
Zh: “看起来不太可能，哈里。我很抱歉。我不应该继续给你写信的。我那时太年轻了……”

En: We both said a lot of things. We were very young.
Zh: “我们都说过很多话，我们都还很年轻。”

En: Actually, you didn't *say* it. You *wrote* it in a letter, a handwritten letter. I kept it in my paperwork.
Zh: “事实上，你不仅仅是*说*了。你还*写在*一封信里，一封手写信里。我一直把它放在我的文件里。”

En: It doesn't matter anymore.
Zh: “已经不重要了。”

En: As *queen regnant* I write a lot of letters. She brushes a strand of white hair out her eye.
Zh: “作为*当朝女王*，我写了很多封信。”她剥开眼睛里的一缕头发。

En: You need to recite it to her. For effect. All of it. No summaries.
Zh: 你需要背给她听。为了达到效果。所有一切。不要概括。

En: It was her. I can feel it. I can see it in her tender, long fingers. In her wrists... Her hand wrote it. Said those things.
Zh: 是她。我能感觉到。我能在她温柔纤长的手指里看见，还有她的手腕……她亲手写的。说出那些话吧。

En: You know what I mean. You left me a letter saying you will always come back to me. That you can't believe how happy you are with me. (Summarize.)
Zh: “你知道我是什么意思。你给我留下一封信，说你总是会回到我身边。还说不敢相信跟我在一起有多开心。”（概括。）

En: I have it right here -- let me refresh your memory. Let's take a... (Pause bitterly.) "...trip down memory lane." (Start reciting.)
Zh: “它就在我这里——让我帮你恢复一下记忆。让我们……”（苦涩地暂停片刻。）“……深入往事的回忆。”（开始背诵。）

En: Yeah. Put a stake through your heart. She'll get hurt too -- collateral damage.
Zh: 是啊。把木桩插入你的心脏。她也会受伤——连带伤害。

En: She won't get hurt, she'll bend out of the way.
Zh: 她不会受伤的，她会躲开的。

En: Please, Harry, I just don't have time for this.
Zh: “拜托，哈里，我真的没时间。”

En: (Take out the letter and read.) "Every morning, when I step out and you're asleep behind me, I find a LITTLE PIECE OF SADNESS in me. I carry it in my chest down Voyager road."
Zh: （拿出信，念了起来。）“每天清晨，当我走出去，身后的你还在沉睡，我感觉自己有一点点悲伤。我把它藏在心底，沿着远航路走下去。”

En: Every step I take, it grows. Until by the time I reach the fuel station it has filled me COMPLETELY. I step on the light rail and look back, something-something, bow collector. I know it will be like this -- until I WALK BACK TO YOU...
Zh: “我每走一步，它都会生长。当我走到加油站的时候，它已经充斥了我的全身。我踏上轻轨，回头张望，那个东西，弓形集电器。我知道会是这样——直到我最终回到你身边……”

En: You, you. Every step I take will get LIGHTER. It almost makes me RUN. Sometimes I do. I can't believe I met you, I can't believe the happiness I feel with you. You have a vast, vast soul and I will always ALWAYS, ALWAYS come back to it.
Zh: “你啊你。我每走一步，脚步就越发轻盈。几乎让我想要开始奔跑。我有时会那样做。不敢相信我会遇见你，不敢相信跟你在一起的那些快乐。你拥有如此浩瀚又博大的灵魂，而我也将一直，永远回到它身边。”

En: Okay, stop. Yes, she surrenders. "Are you happy now?"
Zh: “好了，停住。是的，”她投降了。“现在你开心了吗？”

En: There's more: kisses-kisses-kisses.
Zh: “还有更多呢：吻你-吻你-吻你。”

En: It's a good thing I'm *already* passed out and bleeding this time. Otherwise I'd pass out *again*.
Zh: “好在这次我*已经*晕倒了，还在流血。不然的话，我可能*又会*晕过去。”

En: Being a police detective, I have performed a handwriting analysis on this, so I *know* it was you.
Zh: “作为一个警探，我对它进行了笔迹分析，所以我*知道*是你。”

En: What do you mean stopped saying things?
Zh: “你说*不再说话*是什么意思？”

En: It doesn't say anything anymore. I think there was something I had to do with it. But I didn't. And now it's dead.
Zh: “它再也不会说什么了。我觉得自己必须做点什么。但我没有。所以现在它死了。”

En: Nothing.
Zh: “没什么。”

En: No, I'm not happy.
Zh: “不，我不开心。”

En: She sighs in frustration. "Then why are you *doing* this?"
Zh: 她挫败地叹了一口气：“那你为什么还要*这样做*？”

En: ... it was *a hundred million years ago*. I was someone else then -- filled to the brim with love for you. Hanging on your every word. Oh Harry, you were the *coolest*... But I am no longer that person. This... She points to herself. "... has taken her place. It will devour you. Harry -- I will eat your mind."
Zh: “……那已经是*一亿年前的事了*。那时的我是另外一个样子——身心都充满了对你的爱。会记住你说出的每一个字。哦，哈里，曾经的你是*最酷的*……但我不再是那个她了。这个人……”她指了指自己。“……已经占据了她的位置。它会毁灭你。哈里——我会吞噬掉你的精神。”

En: Very well, she sighs. "I wrote it. It was morning, you slept. There was hoarfrost on the ground when I left. On Voyager Road. It was autumn, the first autumn. But Harry, please understand -- it was a million years ago. No..."
Zh: “很好，”她叹了口气。“是我写的。那是一个清晨，你还在睡觉。我离开的时候，地上起了白霜。在远航路上。那是一个秋天，第一个秋季。但是哈里，请理解——那已经是一百万年前的事了。不……”

En: Voyager Road -- I know that place. Where is it?
Zh: “远航路——我知道那个地方。那是哪里？”

En: Where is this Voyager Road?
Zh: “远航路在哪里？”

En: What now? What happens now? What is the next thing we talk about? (Conclude.)
Zh: “那现在呢？现在会怎么样？我们接下来要聊什么？”（总结。）

En: I was... cool?
Can't you turn back to the person you were? Can't you think I'm cool again?
Zh: “不能变回你曾经的样子？难道你不觉得我又变酷了吗？”

En: We will always have what was. She leans on her hand luggage and smiles faintly: "I will always be *influenced* by it. But it is over. Now only total, unrelenting hell remains."
Zh: “我们将永远拥有过去。”她靠在自己的行李上，勉强地笑了笑。“我一直会被它*影响*。但是一切都结束了。现在只剩下完全的，无情的地狱。”

En: There was a bow collector. A light rail. Street car number...
Zh: “那里有个弓形集电器。一趟轻轨。电車号码……”

En: The coolest... She closes her eyes: "With your leather jacket and your boot cut pants. Smoking in the bus stop. I wanted you to be the rest of my life that day. And you were -- some of it, at least. You were my first. My first kiss, my first time to have sex."
Zh: “是最酷的……”她闭上双眼：“穿着你的皮夹克，还有喇叭裤。在公交車站抽烟。那一天，我觉得往后余生都是你。而你就是——至少其中一部分是。你是我的第一个男人。我的初吻，我的初夜。”

En: The light of the video rental shines through her dress now. A Dolorian figure, cut in black, moves below. It's still her. Her legs, her breasts, her hips...
Zh: 录像带租赁店的灯光照耀在她的裙子上。一个黑色的德洛莉丝人形，在下面移动。她还是她。她的双腿，她的胸膛，她的臀……

En: The first -- and worst -- time I fell in love. I will always have that with me. It's a fact. But that is all it is. It's like a ticket stub, Harry. It doesn't *do* anything anymore.
Zh: “那是我第一次——也是最糟糕的一次——陷入爱情。我会一直背负着它。这是个事实。但是一切也就这样了。就像一张車票存根，哈里。它再也没有什么*用处*了。”

En: A ticket stub...
Zh: “一张車票存根……”

En: Yes. Let's talk about that too. She nods. "Let's bring it up -- the zoo. In Le Jardin. The day we went east of the river. To the aquarium first... I was sad about my mother. I don't even know why. The shimmer of the fish tank on my face, the octopuses..."
Zh: “是的。我们也说说那个吧。”她点点头。“我们谈一谈——那个动物园。在勒雅尔丹。就是我们去河流东岸那天。第一次去水族馆……我为自己的母亲感到难过。我甚至都不知道是为什么。鱼缸的微光照在我的脸上，那只章鱼……”

En: It was just a day then, but to think! Were we there now, you could touch my hair, kiss me. Talk to me about anything; go... She shakes her head. "...virtually *anywhere* in the world. Not like now -- now our interactions are limited to *pain and regret*."
Zh: “那只是一天而已。但是想想！如果我们现在在那里，你可以抚摸我的头发，亲吻我。跟我谈论任何事情；去……”她摇摇头，“……几乎可以说是世界上的*任何地方*。而不是像现在——现在我们的交流已经被限制在了*痛苦与后悔*之中。”

En: That's sharp. And precise.
Zh: 很尖锐，而且很精准。

En: You're so sharp...
Zh: “你真的很尖锐……”

En: No.
Zh: 不。

En: No, it's all you. I always loved you for it -- but it could not save us. It could not make me stay. In the end your mind just told you precisely how *bad* things are, and who would want to stay around for that?
Zh: “不，全都是你。我会一直因为它爱着你——但它不能拯救我们俩。它不能让我留下来。最后，你的脑袋只是精确地告诉你，事情到底有多*糟糕*，谁又愿意为此留下来呢？”

En: You would be right to drown this shit in alcohol. Drown it... until your neurons depolarize. Until it's gone, melted.
Zh: 你把这鬼东西浸泡在酒里是对的。淹死它……直到你的神经细胞退极。直到它消失，融化。

En: Why? There is still a way to win her back, you know. All you need to do is *analyze*.
Zh: 为什么？还有办法能把她赢回来，你知道的。你唯一要做的就是*道歉*。

En: Can't you turn back to the person you were? I can see her in you. Under the gown and that wreath..
Zh: “难道你就不能变回曾经的那个你吗？我还能在你身上看到她的影子。就在礼服和花冠下面……”

En: No. You scared it out of me. With your crying. Your hysteric... She stops. "The awful time we wound up having. In the cheap rental flats you could afford..."
Zh: “不。你把她吓跑了。用你的哭泣，你的歇斯底里……”她停顿了一下。“我们最后过得很糟糕。在你能负担起的一个廉价出租公寓里……”

En: Can't you see -- I can never think you're cool again. I can only think that way about *new* people.
Zh: “你没看见吗——我再也不会觉得你很酷了。我只会像那个*新的我*一样思考。”

En: And my Crown of Immortality? No. She shakes her head. "You scared her out of me. With your crying, your..." She stops. "The awful time we wound up having. In the cheap rental flats you could afford..."
Zh: “还有我的不朽王冠吗？不。”她摇摇头。“你把她吓跑了。用你的哭泣，你的……”她停顿了一下。“我们最后过得很糟糕。在那间破公寓里，你就只住得起那种地方……”

En: There. She points across the water, into the darkness. "You could not pay the electrical bill. It became a lightless tomb. The years you spent training for the militia, my parents' money... It was not good."
Zh: “那里。”她指着漆黑一片的对岸。“你没办法付清电费账单。它变成了一座黯淡的坟墓。你在公民武装训练了那么多年，我父母的钱……这并不好。”

En: It's here. She looks around. "We are *on* Voyager Road. At the end of it -- three hundred metres from the stop. We used to come here to rent videos."
Zh: “就在这里。”她四下看了看。“我们*就在*远航路上。在它的尽头——离車站300多米。我们以前会来这里租录像带。”

En: It wouldn't be a cheap rental this time...
Zh: 这次不会是廉价公寓了……

En: You're a better man now. With a rank, in a powerful, armed organization.
Zh: 现在你已经变成一个更好的男人了。有了职称，还隶属于一个强大的武装组织。

En: A cheap rental... with mold on the walls, and the tap dripping.
Zh: 一个廉价公寓……墙上长满苔藓，水龙头在嘀嗒。

En: It won't help anyway.
Zh: 反正也没什么用。

En: Cheap flats... So the rich man took you from me.
Zh: “廉价公寓……所以是有钱人把你从我身边夺走了。”

En: We can get a nice place this time. I can provide for you. I was young and weak then.
Zh: “这次我们可以找个更好的地方。我可以提供给你的。那时候的我太年轻也太脆弱。”

En: I can afford a better place this time. We can try again -- this time with money. I can *win* now.
Zh: “这次我能负担起一个更好的地方。我们可以再试一次……这次我们有钱了。现在我可以*赢*了。”

En: Yes. I have found someone. For whom I can feel the same -- a copy of my love for you, only this time he is careful and rich. He will not lose me. It will go somewhere. It will grow...
Zh: “是的。我已经爱上别人了。在他身上我找到了相同的感觉——他是我对你的爱的复制品。但区别是，他很富有也很贴心。他不会失去我的。我们之间会有结果的。它会成长……”

En: No. It's too late. I found someone for whom I feel the same love I did for you. Only this time -- he is more careful, he will not lose me. It will go somewhere. It will grow...
Zh: “不。已经太迟了。我已经找到某个人了。我爱他就像曾经爱你一样。只是这一次——他更小心，不会失去我的。我们之间会有结果的。它会成长……”

En: Nothing will. I've been poisoned by newspaper and news. All I can do is scream at them and think of her, secretly.
Zh: 什么都没用。我被报纸和新闻毒害了。我唯一能做的就是朝着他们尖叫，然后偷偷摸摸地想她。

En: Harry, do you notice how... none of this is very *funny*?
Zh: “哈里，你注意到了吗……这一切并不*有趣*？”

En: No, this is very funny. Ha-ha-ha.
Zh: “不，这很有趣。哈哈哈。”

En: Yes. You are the least funny part about me.
Zh: “是的。你是我身上最无趣的那部分。”

En: What did you mean by *grow*?
Zh: “你说*成长*是什么意思？”

En: She smiles mysteriously, looking east. Then turns her gaze back to you. The smile is gone.
Zh: 她看向东方，神秘地笑了。接着她回头看着你。笑容消失了。

En: Your heart burns. Through the blackness you feel the treacle of blood on the mattress below you...
Zh: 你的心在烧。透过黑暗，你感到身下的床垫渗透出浓稠又甜蜜的血浆……

En: Stop laughing like that, please. It's *scary*.
Zh: “别这样笑了，求你。有点*吓人*。”

En: I hate being that. I don't want to be anything for you. I hope the decades it takes for you to get over me have already passed.
Zh: “我讨厌那样。我不想为你做任何事。如果说你要花十年才能忘记我，那我希望它已经过去了。”

En: Forty-two, she nods sadly. "That is the light rail that took me to Couron, to school and work. Every morning... it's the same stop I met you at, Harry. A hundred thousand million years ago..."
Zh: “42，”她悲伤地点点头。“就是那个轻轨带着我去了科戎，去上学，去工作。每天清晨……我总会在同一个車站遇到你，哈里。就在十亿年以前……”

En: No human being should still remember the position of atoms such... aeons ago. It must feel unnaturally sad -- a sadness so ancient, it is shared even by archaebacteria.
Zh: “没人应该记得它的位置，特别是……那么漫长的时间之前。那样肯定会感觉到不自然的悲伤——那么古老的悲伤，甚至太古细菌都与之共享。”

En: The house...
Zh: “那栋房子……”

En: It's here, Harry. She looks around. "We are *on* Voyager Road. At the end of it -- three hundred metres from the stop. We used to come here to rent videos."
Zh: “它就在这里，哈里。”她看了看周围。“我们*就在*远航路上。在它的尽头——离車站300米。我们以前会来这里租录像带。”

En: Is there really anything left? If not, we can always repeat one of the things we have already talked about. Talk about it *again*... She looks over her shoulder. "If you do not to feel like doing that, you should let me go the aerodrome."
Zh: “还有什么剩下的吗？如果没有，我们可以一直重复之前已经讨论过的话题。*再*讨论一次……”她回头看了看。“如果你不想这么做，那就应该放我去机场。”

En: Don't let her. Don't let her go there. You should re-do the topics. Go over *everything*, the things you didn't say before too. Make it go on and on...
Zh: 别让她这么做。别让她去那里。你应该重新寻找话题。重温*一切*，想想你之前还没有说过的东西。让这一切不断的继续……

En: She shakes her head. "I am actually very ordinary, Harry. Below this gown and wreath I have an ordinary soul and ordinary thoughts. The only thing inhuman about me is this..." She looks around.
Zh: 她摇摇头。“我真的很普通，哈里。在这件礼服和花冠之下，我拥有的是普通的灵魂和普通的思想。我唯一不人道的就是……”她看了看周围。

En: This *thing* you've made me into. I'm sorry for saying so, but I just *hate* it. What is this? This is so far gone, Harry, I don't even...
Zh: “就是你把我变成的这个*东西*。很抱歉我这么说，但我真的太*恨*它了。这是干什么？一切已经早就过去了，哈里，我甚至不能……”

En: My lungs do not *glow*, Harry. I am just like all the others. None of us have glowing lungs -- stop making me into some kind of...
Zh: “我的肺部不会*发光*，哈里。我只是跟其他人一样。所有人的肺都不会发光——别再让我变成某种……”

En: No, you're special. You had glowing lungs.
Zh: “不，你是特别的。你的肺会发光。”

En: Then it's you. *You* will make her lungs glow. Your pain is NOT meaningless.
Zh: 那就是你。*你*会让她的肺发光。你的痛苦不是毫无意义的。

En: Then *I* will make you different. I will make your lungs glow. I will make you last *forever*.
Zh: “那*我*会让你变得不同。我会让你的肺发光。我会让你变得*永恒*。”

En: Oh, Harry... There is only one way for humans to last forever -- and you did not do that to me... She shakes her head.
Zh: “哦，哈里……人类只有一种方法才能变得永恒——-你一定不会想那样对我的……”她摇摇头。

En: I will build you a temple of light with my mind. A temple of unimaginable proportions. It will be something no one has ever done before. I will build it with computers.
Zh: “我会在脑子里为你建造一座光之神庙。一座大到难以想象的庙宇。这会是一件没人做过的壮举。我会用电脑把它构建起来。”

En: An immortal temple of light? That sounds nice. I *do* want someone to do that for me -- who wouldn't? -- but not you. I don't want *anything* from you.
Zh: “一座永恒的光之神庙？听起来好像不错。我*确实*希望有人能为我这样做——谁不想呢？——但是你不行。我不想从你这里得到*任何东西*。”

En: You're right. You don't have glowing lungs. You don't deserve them.
Zh: “你是对的。你没有会发光的肺。你不配。”

En: Surely the alcohol didn't help either.
Zh: 当然了，酒精也帮不上忙。

En: She looks at her toenails sticking out from under the gown. "Everyone has a little glass of wine every now and then. I certainly do. It's a *queen regnant* thing. I don't think it was the alcohol -- it was *inevitability*."
Zh: 她看着礼服下伸出的脚趾头。“每个人时不时都会来上一小杯酒。我也一样。就是*当朝女王*的感觉就是了。我不觉得那是酒——那是*无法逃避的事情*。”

En: Was I... were *we* drinking?
Zh: “我有没有……*我们*有没有喝酒？”

En: No, that's not it. It's super easy to quit drinking. And it has no effect on human relations of this kind.
Zh: 不，不是这样的。戒酒真的非常容易。而且对这类人际关系没有任何影响。

En: See. If you drank with her, you'd be cool again. If you drank with her, you could have sex on alcohol...
Zh: 看见了吧。如果你跟她一起喝酒，你又能变酷了。如果你跟她一起喝酒，就可以一起醉醺醺的颠鸾倒凤了……

En: You are right.
Zh: 你是对的。

En: Okay, Harry. She sighs. "Okay. It was morning and you slept. The room smelled of cigarettes and rowans. There was hoarfrost on the ground, when I left. It was autumn, the first one we had together. But you have to understand -- it was a million years ago. No..."
Zh: “好吧，哈里。”她叹了口气。“好吧。那是一个清晨，你还在睡觉。房间满是香烟和花楸的味道。我离开的时候，地上都是白霜。那时已经是秋天了，我们一起度过的第一个秋季……你必须理解——那已经是一百年前的事了。不对……”

En: Mass murderer!
Zh: “杀人凶手！”

En: War criminal!
Zh: “战犯！”

En: That is *very* contested by modern historians. She tramples her little feet for warmth and adds: "Very contested. Plus..."
Zh: “对于现代历史学家来说，这一点受到了*非常*强烈的质疑，”她跺着脚想要暖和一下身体，然后接着说到：“强烈的质疑。再加上……”

En: Who says that? I have ruled with kindness, grace and temperance. It's perfectly normal to have an Army of Humanity. I am the innocence of humanism -- I call it whatever I want to.
Zh: “谁说的？我是个仁慈，优雅又节制的统治者。拥有一支人道的军队完全是正常的。我是人道主义的无罪女王——我想怎么称呼它都可以。”

En: You're only saying this because things didn't work out between us. I have to go to the aerodrome now. I don't have time to defend myself from these accusations.
Zh: “你这么说是因为我们之间没有结果。现在我必须去机场了。我没时间为这些控诉辩解。”

En: Besides, you're only saying this because things didn't work out between us. She stops. "I really have to go to the aerodrome, I don't have time for this."
Zh: “再说，你只说这是因为我们俩之间没有结果。”她停顿了一下。“我真的要赶去机场了，我没时间说这个。”

En: Stop making her angry! She won't start loving you again if you call her a war criminal. Seriously.
Zh: 别再惹怒她了！如果你叫她战犯，她是不会再次爱上你的。我是认真的。

En: Stop making her angry. She won't start loving you again if you call her a *mass murderer*. Seriously.
Zh: 别再惹怒她了！如果你叫她*杀人凶手*，她是不会再次爱上你的。我是认真的。

En: Would you say you haven't behaved like a mass murderer -- with me?
Zh: “你会说你在我面前没有表现的像个杀人凶手吗？”

En: You're right. I'm sorry. You're soft and good, not a mass murderer.
Zh: “你说得对。我很抱歉。你温柔又善良，不是杀人凶手。”

En: You're right. I'm sorry. You're soft and good, not a war criminal.
Zh: “你说得对。我很抱歉。你温柔又善良，不是战犯。”

En: Would you say you didn't behave like a war criminal with me?
Zh: “你会说你在我面前没有表现的像个战犯吗？”

En: You were very bad to me too... She stops. "We've talked about it like seven million times now, I don't want to do that anymore."
Zh: “你对我也很糟糕……”她停顿了一下。“我们已经说过大概700万次了，我不想再来一遍。”

En: I'm not that either... Can't I just *be*?
Zh: “那也不对……难道我不能*就是我*吗？”

En: I can still make your lungs glow, I know I can. If you only let me.
Zh: “我还能让你的肺发光，我知道我可以。只要你允许我这么做。”

En: But then this is all meaningless.
Zh: “但是那就毫无意义了啊。”

En: It is -- and it's making me late for my beautiful-beautiful flight to Mirova. Far, far away from you -- and Revachol.
Zh: “没错——而且这会让我赶不上那趟飞往米诺瓦的美丽航班。远远地，远远地离开你——还有瑞瓦肖。”

En: She will -- once you have erected the TEMPLE OF LIGHT.
Zh: 她会的——只要你建好光之神庙。

En: No answer. The arches of her brows quiver as she looks you in the eye and backs away from you...
Zh: 没有回应。她看向你的眼睛，紧皱的眉头微微颤抖，随后背过身去……

En: You won't do any of that. You can barely make her cry.
Zh: 你不会这样做的。你已经不太可能让她流泪了。

En: I didn't ask for them either. They're just a folk tale that has nothing to do with my reign, or the direction I have set our species on... She glances over her shoulder, then back at you.
Zh: “我也没有要求啊。那只是民间故事，跟我的统治，或者我为人类设定的方向没有一点关系……”她往后看了一眼，然后转回头望着你。

En: You couldn't make her lungs glow anyway, only cry. And maybe not even that anymore.
Zh: 再说你也没办法让她的肺发光，你只会让她哭泣。而且就连后者，也不太可能了。

En: Her cheek against mine...
Zh: 她的脸颊贴着我……

En: Cold silver against my forehead...
Zh: 冰冷的银光拂过我的前额……

En: ...feels like soft fuzz, a bird covered in down feathers. Brushing against your broken capillaries.
Zh: ……感觉就像柔软雪白的绒毛，一只被羽绒覆盖的小鸟。轻轻扫过你那破碎的毛细血管。

En: You're not... kissing me back. (End.)
Zh: “你没有……回吻我。”（总结。）

En: The delicate wreath on her forehead, pressing into your temple. The silver is cold from the spring evening air.
Zh: 她前额上精美的花冠压在你的太阳穴上。白银在春日的晚风中感觉十分冰凉。

En: The moment is ending. She is going to move her face away from yours...
Zh: 这一刻就要结束了。她要把脸移开……

En: Okay, I'm not gonna push it. I have other questions.
Zh: “好吧，我不会逼你的。我还有其他问题。”

En: Other questions are the last thing I need right now... She cups her ear.  "Hush, can you hear? I think that's the 42..."
Zh: “其他问题是我现在最不需要的东西……”她捂住了自己的耳朵。“嘘，你没听见吗？我觉得那是42……”

En: It's not. It's not that yet. It's another, you have plenty of time to win her over with *questions* and kisses...
Zh: 不是。还没到。是别的，你还有很多时间，可以用*问题*和亲吻挽回她。

En: I have discovered a new species -- I will name it in your honour. It's beautiful like you, and also has a white head. I'll call it Doraensis.
Zh: “我发现了一个新物种——我将以你的名字为它们命名。它就像你一样美丽，而且脑袋也是白色的。我就叫它德莉竹节虫。”

En: I have discovered a new species -- I will name it in your honour. The Dolorian Phasmid. It's beautiful like you and also has a white head.
Zh: “我发现了一个新物种——我将以你的名字为它们命名。德洛莉丝竹节虫。它就像你一样美丽，而且脑袋也是白色的。”

En: The phasmid queen! Quick!
Zh: 竹节虫女王！快！

En: That sounds like it would be in the news... I don't want that, okay? There's a pause. "Please don't name it that. You discovering a new species changes nothing. If someone else discovered a new species and named it after me, then I would be flattered. But not you."
Zh: “听起来好像能上新闻……我不想要，好吗？”她停顿了一下。“请不要起这种名字。就算发现新物种，也改变不了什么。如果其他人发现一个新物种，然后以我命名，那我会感到很荣幸。但你不行。”

En: It failed...
Zh: 失败了……

En: But I succeeded...
Zh: 但是我成功了……

En: This was not about failure or success. This was always going to be horror. I should not have suggested it, and you should not have listened to me.
Zh: 这与失败或者成功无关。一切总是会变得惨不忍睹。我不应该这么建议，而你也不应该听我的。

En: Squeeze her wrist.
Zh: 紧握她的手腕。

En: Her hand does not return the grip. Her body is rigid. A current of unease courses through it.
Zh: 她的手没有任何回应。她的身体很僵硬，一股不安的电流从中穿过。

En: She is not kissing you back.
Zh: 她没有回吻你。

En: I feel her breath...
Zh: 我感觉到她的呼吸……

En: Her chest rising like a pillow, warm exhalations against the side of your mouth -- her tender soul moving through her lungs.
Zh: 她的胸膛像枕头一样起伏，你的唇边感到一股温热的气息——那是穿过她肺部的柔软灵魂。

En: The world's most precious material, reserved for those she lets close enough to feel it. You are stealing a touch. It's not yours to take.
Zh: 这个世界上最珍贵的布料，只留给那些能够足够靠近她的人去感受。你偷走了一下轻触，但它并不属于你。

En: Hidden, distant, kept safe from you.
Zh: 隐蔽的，遥远的，远离你。

En: Distrust. For you. The curve of her spine, her shoulders hunched. She keeps herself stiff, her centre guarded from your motions, unresponsive to your guidance.
Zh: 怀疑。对你的怀疑。她脊椎的曲线，她蜷缩的双肩。她让自己变得僵硬，远离你；她的中心抵御着你的动作，对你的引导毫无反应。

En: Apricot scented chewing gum.
Zh: 杏子口味的口香糖。

En: ...trying hard not to look at you. When she withdrew and you held on to her hand she tried not to look at your face and see the expression there.
Zh: ……努力试着不去看你。她想要收回的时候，你抓住了她的手。她试着不去看你的脸，不想让你看到上面的表情。

En: Brother, you should put me in front of a firing squad. I have no words for how I failed you.
Zh: 兄弟，你应该把我放在行刑队前面。我辜负了你，我无话可说。

En: You didn't kiss me back.
Zh: “你没有回吻我。”

En: *You're* the Apricot Chewing Gum Scented One.
Zh: “*你是*杏子味的口香糖。”

En: Why didn't you kiss me back?
Zh: “你为什么没有回吻我？”

En: That's it then.
Zh: “那就这样吧。”

En: She breathes out, heavily, as if something painful has passed through her -- and shakes her head.
Zh: 她重重地呼了一口气，就好像是某种痛苦穿过了她的身体——摇了摇她的头。

En: I thought you would... I know you still love me. You *can't* not.
Zh: “我以为你会……我知道你还爱我。你*不可能*不爱的。”

En: I just needed to do that. I'm sorry.
Zh: “我必须这么做。我很抱歉。”

En: Say nothing, stand there like a useless dildo.
Zh: 什么也不说，像一个没用的废物站在原地。

En: The world should end. Now.
Zh: “世界会结束的。就是现在。”

En: She shakes her head one more time. The evening wind rustles her hair, blowing old newspapers and fast food wrappings down the street...
Zh: 她又摇了摇头。晚风撩起她的头发，吹起了街上的旧报纸和快餐包装袋……

En: It does not. It goes on. Children run in the back alleys. Pigeons take flight. She shakes her head one more time as the evening wind rustles her hair.
Zh: 它没有。它还在继续。孩子们在后巷奔跑。鸽子腾空而起。她又摇了摇头，晚风撩起了她的头发。

En: No... She just shakes her head once more. "I'm just Dora."
Zh: “不……”她只是又摇摇头。“我只是朵拉。”

En: No, Harry. Not yet. There is one more thing you have to see... She slides her hands down her chest, and onto her lower stomach. And smiles.
Zh: “不，哈里。还不行。还有一件事你必须明白……”她的手滑向胸膛，停在下腹上，然后笑了。

En: *Why* did you do that to yourself? You know I don't cheat, Harry. I never cheated on you.
Zh: “*为什么*你要这样对你自己？你知道我不会背叛你的，哈里。我从来没有对你不忠过。”

En: I'm pregnant.
Zh: “我怀孕了。”

En: Is it mine?
Zh: “是我的吗？”

En: It's his, the man I heard on the phone?
Zh: “是他的，电话里那个男人的吗？”

En: It's not mine.
Zh: “不是我的。”

En: Swallow.
Zh: 吞口水。

En: Of course not. She looks down at her belly, then up into your old eyes...
Zh: “当然不是。”她看向小腹，然后对上你沧桑的双眼……

En: I terminated yours. Don't you remember, you *poor* fuck? Poverty-stricken fuck.
Zh: “我流掉了。你不记得了吗，你这个*可怜虫*？穷困潦倒的混蛋。”

En: Now, go ahead... She wipes her palms into the silk of her gown. "...ask me more questions. Let's talk about *something else*."
Zh: “现在，来吧……”她用掌心摩挲着丝绸礼服。“……再多问我些问题。让我们聊聊*其他事情*。”

En: Yes. He did it. She looks down at her belly, then up into your old eyes...
Zh: “没错，是他的。”她看向小腹，然后对上你沧桑的双眼……

En: I terminated yours. Don't you remember, you *poor* fuck? You poverty-stricken fuck.
Zh: “我流掉了。你不记得了吗，你这个可怜虫？穷困潦倒的混蛋。”

En: No. This has to end. Do the last one.
Zh: 不，这一切应该结束。再做最后一次。

En: You know what this means.
Zh: “你知道是什么意思。”

En: Of course not. She looks down at her belly, then up into your old eyes...
Zh: “当然不是。”她看向小腹，然后对上你沧桑的双眼……

En: I forgive you that you're pregnant. I can deal with it. Just...
Zh: “你怀孕这一点，我原谅你。我能忍受。只是……”

En: Oh, Harry... I don't need you to forgive. It's a *good* thing for me. She smiles. "It's good news, why aren't you smiling more?"
Zh: “哦，哈里……我不需要你的原谅。对我来说，这是一件*好事*。”她笑了。“这是好消息，你为什么不笑了？”

En: No! Don't say it. Don't beg. It will only make her *go*!
Zh: 不！别说出来。不要乞求。这样只会让她*离开*的！

En: I *have* to, Harry. Really, I've already missed the 8:30... Her fingers wrap around the bag handle. "I'm gonna go now..."
Zh: “我*必须*走，哈里。真的，我已经错过了8:30的那班了……”她用手指缠绕在旅行箱的手柄上。“现在我该走了……”

En: Wait, can't we sit down and have a coffee first? There's a cafeteria on the corner... (Point east.)
Zh: “等等，我们能不能先坐下喝杯咖啡？街角就有一家咖啡店……”（指向东边。）

En: Wait, yes! I have *other questions* first. Where's the list?
Zh: 等等，没错！我应该先问*其他问题*。清单哪里去了？

En: Yes! Somewhere hidden among the options popping up in your nervous system... is the *right* one. That will make her love you again, and not go to the aerodrome at all!
Zh: 是的！它就隐藏在你神经系统弹出来的那些选项中间……那个*正确*的答案。这样她又会重新爱上你，根本就不会去什么机场了！

En: No, actually, wait! I need to see my list again, I'm sorry. Where's my list? Wait!
Zh: “不，说真的，等一下！我需要再看看我的清单，我很抱歉。我的清单哪去了？等等！”

En: No. Too late now. You have forgotten your list and the time is up. I am really going now. I must be on the 10:20 flight... She turns.
Zh: “不。现在已经太迟了。你忘了自己的清单，时间也到了。现在我真的要走了。我必须赶上10：20的航班……”她转过身。

En: Okay, I understand. (Nod silently, like a martyr.)
Zh: “好吧，我明白。”（像个殉道者一样安静地点头）

En: (It's all I have left.) "Please..."
Zh: （我只剩下这些了。）“求你……”

En: No. That would only be painful and dull. At the aerodrome -- life, love, and laughter are waiting for me. At the cafeteria -- dust, hell, and tragicomedy.
Zh: “不。这样只会让人觉得痛苦又无趣。在机场，生活、爱情和欢笑正在等待着我。在咖啡店里——只有灰尘，地狱和悲喜剧。”

En: A warm gust wraps her gown around her waist and between her thighs.
Zh: 一阵暖风吹起，她的礼服缠绕在腰间和腿间。

En: An apricot scented ghost wafts out of her -- her skin, the fabric -- into the flow of the air around you.
Zh: 一个散发着杏子香味的幽灵从她身上飘了出来——她的皮肤，还有衣服上——融入到你周围的空气中。

En: All the roads will miss her footsteps when she's gone from here.
Zh: 当她离开这里时，所有道路都会想念她的脚步。

En: A completely different world.
Zh: 一个完全不同的世界。

En: I miss you so much.
Zh: “我很想你。”

En: I want to go back to the completely different world. The see-through world with you.
Zh: “我想回到那个完全不同的世界。跟你一起的那个透明的世界。”

En: Say nothing.
Zh: 什么也不说。

En: It will pass... The gown moves on her limbs, like water. "Everything does."
Zh: “会过去的……”礼服在她身上飘动，宛若流水。“一切都会。”

En: Please, Harry... The gown moves on her limbs, like water. "I don't understand what you're saying. You're pitiful and frightening, a smoky apparition of its former self."
Zh: “求你了，哈里……”礼服在她身上飘动，宛若流水。“我不明白你在说什么。你可怜又让人害怕，是过去的你那虚无缥缈的幽灵。”

En: The gown moves on her limbs, like water. She breathes out, her breath heavy. You're running out of ideas.
Zh: 礼服在她身上飘动，宛若流水。她重重地呼出一口气。你已经没主意了。

En: Hold on, what is there to do in Mirova?
Zh: “等等，你打算在米诺瓦做什么？”

En: Light, life, *culture*... It's so much better than here. Everything here reminds me of you, and the horrible times we had. The nights we stayed up fighting for our dying love.
Zh: “享受灯光、*文化*、生活……比这里要好多了。这里的一切都会让我想起你，还有和你一起的那些糟糕时光。那些彻夜不眠的夜晚，为了我们死去的爱情争执不休。”

En: What happens now?
Zh: “那现在会怎么样？”

En: Nothing -- I have to go... Her hand wraps around the handle of the bag in her hand again: "I'm gonna go now..."
Zh: “没什么——我得走了……”她的手又抓住了旅行箱的手柄：“我现在就要走了……”

En: I have to wipe it all off me -- and be clean again. I want to be a good person again, not this. Not what you made me into.
Zh: “我要把那些全部擦掉——然后再次变得焕然一新。我想再变回那个好人，而不是现在这样。不是你让我变成的这种人。”

En: But I swore I wouldn't let you go. You *told* me -- you asked me to be this way.
Zh: “但是我发誓，我不会让你走的。你*告诉*过我——是你让我这样做的。”

En: You have sworn a holy oath Harry. She herself begged you to not let her go.
Zh: 你已经许下神圣的誓言，哈里。她自己请求让你不要放她走。

En: You don't want me to let you go. Not really. You asked me not to.
Zh: “你不想让我放你走。不是真的。你让我不要这么做。”

En: Lies, sire! She cannot but love you. She  has said so a hundred times.
Zh: 撒谎，大人！她不得不爱你。她亲口说过上百遍了。

En: That was someone else. I betrayed her, overwrote her, and am happier for it. And I'm really going now. The time is up -- I must be on the 10:20 flight... She turns.
Zh: “那是其他人。我背叛了她，重塑了她，而且更加快乐了。还有，我现在真的要走了。时间到了——我必须赶上10:20的航班……”她转过身去。

En: See you tomorrow.
Zh: “明天见。”

En: See you tomorrow.
Zh: “明天见。”

En: See you tomorrow.
Zh: “明天见。”

En: See you tomorrow.
Zh: “明天见。”

En: See you tomorrow.
Zh: “明天见。”

En: See you tomorrow.
Zh: “明天见。”

En: Cinematics KISS
Zh: 如电影一般的亲吻

En: With your feet trembling from the steps you took -- trepid and fearful -- you stand against her; her body close to you, radiating warmth. With your eyes closed you move your lips on her mouth.
Zh: 你迈出蹒跚的步子——不温不火，又担惊受怕——站到她身旁；她的身体紧贴着你，散发着暖人的温度。你闭上双眼，嘴唇朝她的嘴唇贴了过去。

En: She tried not to look at you -- when she withdrew and you held on to your hand. She tried not to look at your face and see the expression there.
Zh: 她努力试着不去看你——她想要收回的时候，你抓住了她的手。她试着不去看你的脸，不想看到上面的表情。

En: Cinematics END KISS
Zh: 如电影般的最后一吻

En: Cinematics END
Zh: 如电影般的结束

En: Yes.
Zh: 是的。

En: And the shape of the insect, its cyclical praying motion just... going on and on. That thing. Looking at you. You -- two things standing in front of each other...
Zh: 还有昆虫的形状，它那周而复始的祈祷动作……不停地反复着。那个东西。看着你。你——两个东西站在彼此的面前……

En: And a little something in there... a sensation. The bow drawn across a string. Something small and crustacean-like.
Zh: 里面还有一些东西……一种感觉。弓拉过弓弦。某种很小，甲壳类的动物。

En: No. Relax, man. It's just the comfortable darkness. Interrupted by the pain in your body. A telegraph, far away.
Zh: 不，放松点，伙计。这只是一片舒适的黑暗而已。被你身体的疼痛打断了。一封电报，很远很远。

En: Far enough not to hurt for a while.
Zh: 远到暂时无法伤害到你。

En: And your mind healing too. Weaving itself back into shape.
Zh: 而且你的精神也在治愈，自己重新编织成型。

En: You did it... you solved the case.
Zh: 你做到了……你破案了。

En: Somehow you managed to dodge it all... The church, the window *and* the bad book in the store. On the shelf. You made it. Across the black sea unharmed...
Zh: 你不知怎么避开了这一切……教堂，窗户，*还有*商店里那些坏书。就在架子上。你做到了。安然无恙地渡过了黑色的大海……

En: What?
Zh: 什么？

En: Turn to the other side.
Zh: 转向另一边。

En: Nothing. Just threats that passed by -- outside in the world. Ill omens from another life. Not this one. You ignored them. Good. The sleep is nourishing. Take more of it.
Zh: 什么也没有。只有擦身而过的危险——远在世界之外。来自来世的不祥之兆。不是这一个。你都忽略掉了。很好。睡眠能滋养你。再多睡一会儿。

En: You do so many times. Until dim light starts peeking into the hood you're under. The rough karakul. More and more each second. Time to face it again -- the world. Anew...
Zh: 你做过很多次。直到微弱的光芒开始渗透进到你的头巾之下。粗糙的大尾绵羊皮。每分每秒，越变越多。是时候再次面对它了——面对这个世界。重新再来……

En: [Open your eyes.]
Zh: [睁开双眼。]

En: Turn to the other side.
Zh: 转向另一边。

En: Sleep is merciful this time, brother. Not too deep. Lit by the continuous sound of the sea outside.
Zh: 这次睡眠是仁慈的，我的兄弟。不是太深。被外面连绵不绝的海浪声照亮着。
